--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/Job/CollectPay.lua ---

--[[
    CollectPay (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions → Job
    Parent: Job
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Start Job
-- Khizzer
-- August 28, 2023

local Players = game:GetService("Players")


local StartJob = {}

local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer;

local NetworkController;

function StartJob.Get(interactionPart)
    local jobName = localPlayer:GetAttribute('CurrentJob');

    if not jobName then
        return;
    end;

    local jobMoney = localPlayer:GetAttribute('JobMoney') or 0;
    if jobMoney <= 0 then
        return;
    end;

    return `Collect Pay From: {jobName}`, Enum.KeyCode.F, 2
end;

function StartJob.Event(interactionPart)
    localPlayer.PlayerScripts.Sounds.CashOut:Play()
    NetworkController.Send('CollectJobPay', interactionPart);
end;

function StartJob:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end;

return StartJob

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/Job/StartJob.lua ---

--[[
    StartJob (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions → Job
    Parent: Job
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Start Job
-- Khizzer
-- August 28, 2023

local Players = game:GetService("Players")


local StartJob = {}

local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer;

local NetworkController;

function StartJob.Get(interactionPart)
    local lastTriggered = interactionPart:GetAttribute('LastTriggered') or 0;
    if tick() - lastTriggered < 2 then return; end;

    local jobName = interactionPart:GetAttribute('JobName');

    if not jobName then
        return;
    end;

    local currentJob = localPlayer:GetAttribute('CurrentJob');
    if currentJob then
        return `End Job: {currentJob}`, Enum.KeyCode.E, 1
    end

    return `Start Job: {jobName}`, Enum.KeyCode.E, 1.5
end;

function StartJob.Event(interactionPart)
    interactionPart:SetAttribute('LastTriggered', tick());

    if localPlayer:GetAttribute('CurrentJob') then
        return NetworkController.Send('EndCivilianJob', interactionPart);
    end;
    NetworkController.Send('StartCivilianJob', interactionPart);
end;

function StartJob:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end;

return StartJob

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/PayFine.lua ---

--[[
    PayFine (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Pay Fine
-- Khizzer
-- November 20, 2021



local PayFine = {}
local NetworkController;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local YesNoPrompt;

function PayFine.Get()
	if localPlayer.Team ~= game.Teams.Civilian then return; end;

	if not localPlayer:GetAttribute('SpeedingFine') then return; end;

	return 'Pay Fine', Enum.KeyCode.E;
end;

function PayFine.Event()
	YesNoPrompt:CreatePrompt('Pay Fine', 'You have a speeding fine of '..tostring(localPlayer:GetAttribute('SpeedingFine'))..'. Would you like to pay it?',
		function()
			NetworkController.Send('PayFine');
		end, 
		function()
		end)

end;

function PayFine:Init()
	YesNoPrompt = self.Controllers.UI.YesNoPromptGUI;
	NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end;


return PayFine

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/Placeable.lua ---

--[[
    Placeable (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local NetworkController;

local PICK_UP_EVENT;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local Placeable = {};

function Placeable.Get(primaryPart)
--    if localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Tool") then return end

    local placeableConfig = primaryPart.Parent:FindFirstChild('PlaceableConfig');
    if not placeableConfig then return; end;
    placeableConfig = require(placeableConfig)
    if
        not placeableConfig.WhitelistedTeams[localPlayer.Team.Name]
        and not placeableConfig.WhitelistedTeams[localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h']
    then
        if placeableConfig.Condition then
            if not placeableConfig.Condition(localPlayer) then return end
        else
            return
        end
    end

    return 'Pick Up', Enum.KeyCode.R;
end;

function Placeable.Event(primaryPart)
    NetworkController.Send(PICK_UP_EVENT, primaryPart);
end;

function Placeable:Start()

end;

function Placeable:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;

    local constants = self.Shared.Constants.Placeable;
    PICK_UP_EVENT = constants.PICK_UP_EVENT;
end;

return Placeable;

-- August 29, 2023


local NetworkController;

local char;

function PostDestination.Get(interactionPart)
    local package = char:FindFirstChild('Package');
    
    if not package then return; end;

    return 'Deliver Package', Enum.KeyCode.E;
end;

end;

function PostDestination:CharacterAdded(_char)

end;

function PostDestination:Init()

end;


return PostDestination

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/PostTruck/Place.lua ---

--[[
    Place (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions → PostTruck
    Parent: PostTruck
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Post Office Collection
-- Khizzer
-- August 28, 2023

local NetworkController;

local localPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer;
local car = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Car');

local char;

local PostOfficeCollection = {}

function PostOfficeCollection.Get(interactionPart)
    if not localPlayer:GetAttribute('CurrentJob') == 'Canada Post' then return; end;
    if interactionPart.Parent.Parent ~= car.Value then return; end;
    if not char:FindFirstChild('Package') then return; end;

    local car = interactionPart.Parent.Parent;
    if car.Config.State.DeliveryStarted.Value == true then return; end;

    return 'Place Package', Enum.KeyCode.E
end;

function PostOfficeCollection.Event(interactionPart)
    NetworkController.Send('PlacePackageInTruck', interactionPart);
end;

function PostOfficeCollection:CharacterAdded(_char)
    char = _char;
end;

function PostOfficeCollection:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end


return PostOfficeCollection

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/RegularSeat.lua ---

--[[
    RegularSeat (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Regular Seat
-- Khizzer
-- October 1, 2023



local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local humanoid;

local GetSeatOccupant;

local RegularSeat = {};

function RegularSeat.Get(seat)
    if not seat.Parent then return; end;
    if (GetSeatOccupant(seat)) or (humanoid.Sit) then return; end;

    if localPlayer:GetAttribute('HandcuffedBy') then return; end;
    if localPlayer.Character.Torso:FindFirstChildOfClass('WeldConstraint') then return; end;
    if (localPlayer.Character.PrimaryPart.Position - seat.Position).Magnitude > 5 then return; end;
    if (localPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health <= 1) then return; end;

    return 'Sit', Enum.KeyCode.E;
end;

function RegularSeat.Event(seat)
    seat:Sit(humanoid);
end;

function RegularSeat:CharacterAdded(char)
    if not char then return; end;
    humanoid = char:WaitForChild('Humanoid');
end;

function RegularSeat:Init()
    GetSeatOccupant = self.Modules.GetSeatOccupant;
end;

return RegularSeat;

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/Revive.lua ---

--[[
    Revive (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Revive
-- Khizzer
-- June 6, 2022



local NetworkController;

local PICK_UP_EVENT;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local Players = game:GetService('Players');

local MEDICAL_TEAMS = {
    ['Vancouver Fire & Rescue Service'] = true,
    ['British Columbia Ambulance Service'] = true,
    ['Vancouver Coastal Health'] = true,
};
local MEDICAL_DIVISIONS = {
    ['12VFA'] = true,
};

local Revive = {};


function Revive.Get(primaryPart)
    if not (MEDICAL_TEAMS[localPlayer.Team.Name] or MEDICAL_DIVISIONS[localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h']) then return; end;

    local humanoid = primaryPart.Parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('Humanoid');
    if not humanoid then return; end;
    local targetPlr = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(primaryPart.Parent);
    if not targetPlr then return; end;
    if targetPlr == localPlayer then return; end;

    if targetPlr.Character:GetAttribute('Revived') == true then return; end;
    if targetPlr.Character:GetAttribute('RevivedAt') then
        if os.time() - targetPlr.Character:GetAttribute('RevivedAt') < 120 then return; end;
    end;

    return 'Revive Player', Enum.KeyCode.F, 5;
end;

function Revive.Event(primaryPart)
    local targetPlr = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(primaryPart.Parent);
    if not targetPlr then return; end;
    if targetPlr == localPlayer then return; end;
    if targetPlr.Character:GetAttribute('Revived') == true then return; end;
    if targetPlr.Character:GetAttribute('RevivedAt') then
        if os.time() - targetPlr.Character:GetAttribute('RevivedAt') < 120 then return; end;
    end;

    NetworkController.Send('RAGDOLL_REVIVE', targetPlr);
end;

function Revive:Start()

end;

function Revive:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end;

return Revive;

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/RobBank.lua ---

--[[
    RobBank (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Rob Bank
-- Khizzer
-- July 24, 2021



local NetworkController;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local Date;
local Constants;
local START_BANK_ROBBERY_EVENT;
local Error;

local RobBank = {};

function RobBank.Get(bankInteractionPart)
    return 'Start Hack', Enum.KeyCode.E, 0.5;
end;

function RobBank.Event(bankInteractionPart)
--[[     local date = Date.new();
    date = date:ToUTC();
    date = date:ToSeconds();

    local bankTime = bankInteractionPart:GetAttribute('LastRobbed');

    if date - bankTime < 300 then
        Error('Bank was recently robbed. Please wait ' .. (300 - (date - bankTime)) .. ' seconds.');
        return;
    end; ]]

    if bankInteractionPart:GetAttribute('BeingRobbed') == true then
        Error('Bank is being robbed');
        return;
    end;

    NetworkController.Send(START_BANK_ROBBERY_EVENT);
end;

function RobBank:Start()

end;

function RobBank:Init()
    Error = self.Controllers.UI.ErrorGUI.Error;
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    Constants = self.Shared.Constants.Robbery;
    START_BANK_ROBBERY_EVENT = Constants['START_BANK_ROBBERY_EVENT']
end;

return RobBank;

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/RobberyClaim.lua ---

--[[
    RobberyClaim (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
-- Robbery Claim
-- Khizzer
-- July 25, 2021

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;


local RobberyClaim = {}

local Constants;
local CLAIM_ROBBERY_MONEY_EVENT;
local Network;

function RobberyClaim.Get()
    local backpack = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Backpack');

    local robberyBag = backpack:FindFirstChild('Duffel Bag') or localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Duffel Bag');
    if not robberyBag then return; end;

    return 'Claim Money', Enum.KeyCode.E;
end;

function RobberyClaim.Event(claimPart)
    local backpack = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Backpack');
    local robberyBag = backpack:FindFirstChild('Duffel Bag') or localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Duffel Bag');
    if not robberyBag then return; end;

    Network.Send(CLAIM_ROBBERY_MONEY_EVENT, claimPart);
end;

function RobberyClaim:Init()
    Constants = self.Shared.Constants.Robbery;
    CLAIM_ROBBERY_MONEY_EVENT = Constants['CLAIM_ROBBERY_MONEY_EVENT'];
    Network = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end;

function RobberyClaim:Start()
end;

return RobberyClaim

    Constants = self.Shared.Constants.Robbery;

return RobStore

-- Salter Controls

local SalterControls = {}

function SalterControls.Get(interactionPart)
    if localPlayer.Team.Name ~= 'Translink' then return; end;

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/SearchRecord.lua ---

--[[
    SearchRecord (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local SearchRecord = {}

local NetworkFunctionController
local PlayerLookupGUI
local WhitelistedTeams
local Notification

local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local db = false

function SearchRecord.Get()
    if WhitelistedTeams.CheckLEO(player) or player:GetAttribute("Division") == "GCPS" then return end
    return "View Record", Enum.KeyCode.H
end

function SearchRecord.Event()
    if PlayerLookupGUI:IsEnabled() then
        PlayerLookupGUI:Toggle()
        return
    end

    if db then
        Notification.new("Cooldown", "Try again in a few seconds.", "", "Blue")
        return
    end
    db = true
    task.delay(10, function() db = false end)

    Notification.new("Loading record", "This may take a minute, especially if you have a lot of arrests.", "", "Purple")

    PlayerLookupGUI:Render(NetworkFunctionController.InvokeServer('local_records'), player.Name)
    PlayerLookupGUI:Toggle()
end

function SearchRecord:Init()
    NetworkFunctionController = self.Controllers.NetworkFunctionController
    PlayerLookupGUI = self.Controllers.UI.PlayerLookupGUI
    WhitelistedTeams = self.Shared.Constants.WhitelistedTeams
    Notification = self.Controllers.UI.Notification
end

return SearchRecord

-- Toggleable Gate Controls
-- Khizzer
-- August 28, 2022



local ToggleableGateControls = {}

local NetworkController;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

function ToggleableGateControls.Get(interactionPart)
    local gateConfig = require(interactionPart.Parent.Parent.GateConfig);

    if gateConfig.WhitelistedTeams and not gateConfig.WhitelistedTeams[localPlayer.Team.Name]
        and not gateConfig.WhitelistedTeams[localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h']
    then return; end;
    if gateConfig.ShouldOpenGate and not gateConfig.ShouldOpenGate(localPlayer) then return end

    return 'Toggle Gate', Enum.KeyCode.F, 0.5;
end;

function ToggleableGateControls.Event(interactionPart)
    NetworkController.Send('ToggleableGate', interactionPart.Parent.Parent);
end;

function ToggleableGateControls:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end;


return ToggleableGateControls

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/ToolAnalysis.lua ---

--[[
    ToolAnalysis (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Tool Analysis
-- Khizzer
-- May 17, 2023


local Notification;
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local ToolAnalysis = {}

local char: Model? = nil;

local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer;

local UC_DIVISIONS = {'CFNIS', 'GCPS'};

function ToolAnalysis.Get(interactionPart)
    if not char then return end;
    if not char:FindFirstChildOfClass('Tool') then return; end;

    if not table.find(UC_DIVISIONS, (localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h')) and not _G.Aero.Shared.INSETest(localPlayer) then return; end;

    return 'Analyse Tool', Enum.KeyCode.E
end;

function ToolAnalysis.Event(interactionPart)
    if not char then return end;
    local tool = char:FindFirstChildOfClass('Tool');
    if not tool then return; end;

    local toolSource = tool:GetAttribute('ToolSource');
    if not table.find(UC_DIVISIONS, (localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h')) and not _G.Aero.Shared.INSETest(localPlayer) then return; end;

    if not toolSource then
        Notification.new(`{tool.Name} Analysis`, `This tool has no source info.`);
        return
    end;

    Notification.new(`{tool.Name} Analysis`, toolSource);
end;

function ToolAnalysis:CharacterAdded(_char)
    char = _char;
end;

function ToolAnalysis:Init()
    Notification = self.Controllers.UI.Notification;
end;

return ToolAnalysis

--[[

    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions
    Parent: Interactions
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local ToolContainerGUI;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local car = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Car');

local humanoid;
local CheckLEO;

local Trunk = {};

function Trunk.Get(trunk)
    if humanoid.Sit then return; end;

    if trunk.Parent.Parent ~= car.Value and not CheckLEO(localPlayer) and localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') ~= 'GCPS' then return; end;
    if localPlayer.Character:GetAttribute("HandcuffedBy") then return end
    if localPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health <= 1 then return end

    return 'Access Trunk', Enum.KeyCode.E, 0.5;
end;

function Trunk:CharacterAdded(char)
    if not char then return; end;
    humanoid = char:WaitForChild('Humanoid');
end;

function Trunk.Event(trunk)
    if not ToolContainerGUI.Enabled() then
        ToolContainerGUI:Toggle({
            Type = "Car";
            Instance = trunk.Parent.Parent;
        });
    else
        ToolContainerGUI:Toggle();
    end;
end;

function Trunk:Start()

end;

function Trunk:Init()
    CheckLEO = self.Shared.Constants.WhitelistedTeams.CheckLEO;
    ToolContainerGUI = self.Controllers.UI.ToolContainerGUI;
end;

return Trunk;

-- Uniform Locker
-- Khizzer
-- August 6, 2021



local UniformLocker = {}

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local DivisionFolder = ReplicatedStorage.Divisions;

local UniformLockerGUI;
local WhitelistedTeams;

function UniformLocker.Get(interactionPart)
    if not WhitelistedTeams.CheckEmergencyServices(localPlayer) and not DivisionFolder:FindFirstChild(localPlayer.Team.Name) then return; end;
    if localPlayer.Team.Name == 'Civilian' and localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') == nil then return end
    if interactionPart:GetAttribute('Team') then
        if localPlayer.Team.Name ~= interactionPart:GetAttribute('Team') then return end
    end

    return 'Uniform Locker', if interactionPart:IsDescendantOf(workspace.Cars) then Enum.KeyCode.U else Enum.KeyCode.E, if interactionPart:IsDescendantOf(workspace.Cars) then 0.5 else nil;
end;

function UniformLocker.Event()
    UniformLockerGUI:Enable();
end;

function UniformLocker:Init()
    UniformLockerGUI = self.Controllers.UI.UniformLockerGUI;
    WhitelistedTeams = self.Shared.Constants.WhitelistedTeams;
end;


return UniformLocker

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/VehicleSeat/EnterVehicle.lua ---

--[[
    EnterVehicle (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions → VehicleSeat
    Parent: VehicleSeat
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local car = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Car');
local humanoid;

local GetSeatOccupant;
local AnimationGUI;

local function CharacterAdded(char)
    if not char then return; end;
    humanoid = char:WaitForChild('Humanoid');
end;

local VehicleSeat = {};

function VehicleSeat.Get(seat)
    if localPlayer:GetAttribute('Ragdoll') then return; end;
    if AnimationGUI.Animated then return; end;
    if not seat.Parent then return; end;
    if (GetSeatOccupant(seat)) or (humanoid.Sit) then return; end;
    local carFromSeat = seat.Parent.Parent;
    local isAuthorised = carFromSeat == car.Value or carFromSeat:GetAttribute("Owner") == localPlayer.Name;
    if carFromSeat:GetAttribute('Locked') == nil then
       if (not isAuthorised) and carFromSeat.Config.State.Locked.Value then return; end;
    else
        if (not isAuthorised) and carFromSeat:GetAttribute('Locked') then return; end;
    end;

    if localPlayer:GetAttribute('HandcuffedBy') then return; end;
    if localPlayer.Character.Torso:FindFirstChildOfClass('WeldConstraint') then return; end;

    return 'Enter Vehicle', Enum.KeyCode.E;
end;

function VehicleSeat.Event(seat)
    seat:Sit(humanoid);
end;

function VehicleSeat:Start()
    CharacterAdded(localPlayer.Character);
    localPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(CharacterAdded);
end;

function VehicleSeat:Init()
    AnimationGUI = self.Controllers.UI.AnimationGUI;
    GetSeatOccupant = self.Modules.GetSeatOccupant;
end;

return VehicleSeat;

--[[
    PlaceInVehicle (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions → VehicleSeat
    Parent: VehicleSeat
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Place In Vehicle
-- Khizzer
-- December 28, 2021



local PlaceInVehicle = {}
local NetworkController;
local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local torso;
local victimHumanoid;

local function CharacterAdded(char)
    if not char then return; end;
    torso = char:WaitForChild('Torso');
end;

PlaceInVehicle.Priority = 0;

function PlaceInVehicle.Get(interactionPart)
    if not torso:FindFirstChildOfClass('WeldConstraint') then return; end;
    if not torso.WeldConstraint.Part0 then return; end;
    if interactionPart.Name ~= 'Rear' then return; end;
    if interactionPart:GetAttribute('RestrictedSeat') == true and localPlayer:GetAttribute("Division") ~= "GCPS" and not _G.Aero.Shared.INSETest(localPlayer) then return; end;

    victimHumanoid = torso.WeldConstraint.Part0.Parent.Humanoid;

    return 'Place in Vehicle', Enum.KeyCode.F, nil, 2
end;

function PlaceInVehicle.Event(interactionPart)
    NetworkController.Send('PlaceInVehicle', interactionPart, victimHumanoid)
end;

function PlaceInVehicle:Start()
    CharacterAdded(localPlayer.Character);
    localPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(CharacterAdded);
end

function PlaceInVehicle:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end


return PlaceInVehicle

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/Interactions/VehicleSeat/PullOutOfVehicle.lua ---

--[[
    PullOutOfVehicle (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → Interactions → VehicleSeat
    Parent: VehicleSeat
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Pull Out Of Vehicle
-- Khizzer
-- February 20, 2022

local CollectionService = game:GetService('CollectionService');

local PullOutOfVehicle = {
    Priority = -1,
}
local GetSeatOccupant;
local NetworkController;
local whitelistedTeams;
local HANDCUFF_EVENT;
local cachedPlr;
local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

function PullOutOfVehicle.Get(seat)
    -- TEMPORARILY DISABLED
    if true then return false end

    if localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') ~= 'GCPS' and not whitelistedTeams[localPlayer.Team.Name] then return; end;
    if not GetSeatOccupant(seat) then return; end;

    local character = GetSeatOccupant(seat).Parent;
    if not character then return; end;

    local humanoidRootPart = character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart');
    if not humanoidRootPart then return; end;

    local plr = game:GetService('Players'):GetPlayerFromCharacter(character);
    if not plr then return; end;

    if plr == localPlayer then return; end;

    if whitelistedTeams[plr.Team.Name] and localPlayer:GetAttribute("Division") ~= "GCPS" and not _G.Aero.Shared.INSETest(localPlayer) then return; end;
    if not localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Handcuffs') and not localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Zipcuffs') then return; end;

    if not CollectionService:HasTag(humanoidRootPart, 'HumanoidRootPart') then return; end;

    cachedPlr = plr;

    return 'Pull Out', Enum.KeyCode.F;
end;

function PullOutOfVehicle.Event(seat)
    NetworkController.Send(HANDCUFF_EVENT, cachedPlr.Character.HumanoidRootPart);
end;

function PullOutOfVehicle:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    GetSeatOccupant = self.Modules.GetSeatOccupant;

    local constants = self.Shared.Constants.Handcuff;
    HANDCUFF_EVENT = constants.HANDCUFF_EVENT;

    whitelistedTeams = constants.WhitelistedTeams;
end;


return PullOutOfVehicle

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/JobController.lua ---

--[[
    JobController (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Job Controller
-- Khizzer
-- August 29, 2023

local ContextActionService = game:GetService('ContextActionService');

local Trove;
local WaypointController;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local jobTrove;

local JobController = {}

local waypointIsOn = false;

local JOB_START_CALLBACKS = {
    ['Canada Post'] = function()
        local character = localPlayer.Character;

        jobTrove:Add(character.Humanoid:GetPropertyChangedSignal('SeatPart'):Connect(function()
            local seat = character.Humanoid.SeatPart;

            if seat == nil and waypointIsOn then
                WaypointController.SetVisible(false);
                waypointIsOn = false;
            elseif seat ~= nil then
                local isMyCar = seat.Parent.Parent == localPlayer.Car.Value;
                if not isMyCar then return; end;

                local isPostalTruck = seat.Parent.Parent:GetAttribute('Packages') ~= nil;
                if not isPostalTruck then return; end;

                local currentDestination = seat.Parent.Parent.Config.State:FindFirstChild('CurrentDestination');
                if not currentDestination then return; end;
                if not currentDestination.Value then return; end;

                WaypointController.SetVisible(true);
                WaypointController.SetCurrentDestination(currentDestination.Value.PrimaryPart.Position);

                waypointIsOn = true;
            end
        end))

        jobTrove:Add(ContextActionService.LocalToolEquipped:Connect(function(tool: Tool)
            if tool:FindFirstChild('Destination') then
                WaypointController.SetVisible(true);
                WaypointController.SetCurrentDestination(tool.Destination.Value.PrimaryPart.Position);
                waypointIsOn = true;
            end
        end));

        jobTrove:Add(ContextActionService.LocalToolUnequipped:Connect(function(tool: Tool)
            if tool:FindFirstChild('Destination') then
                WaypointController.SetVisible(false);
                waypointIsOn = false;
            end
        end));
    end
}

function JobController:Start()
	localPlayer:GetAttributeChangedSignal('CurrentJob'):Connect(function()
        local job = localPlayer:GetAttribute('CurrentJob');
        if job == nil then
            jobTrove:Destroy();
            jobTrove = nil;
            return;
        end;

        jobTrove = Trove.new();
        jobTrove:AttachToInstance(localPlayer.Character);

        local callback = JOB_START_CALLBACKS[job];
        if callback then
            callback();
        end;
    end)
end


function JobController:Init()
	Trove = self.Shared.Trove;
    WaypointController = self.Controllers.WaypointController;
end


return JobController

--[[
    KeybindController (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- KeybindGUI
-- Khizzer
-- September 14, 2023
-- Scream was here, October 31st 2024

local ContextActionUtility = require(script.Parent.Parent.Modules.ContextActionUtility);

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local keybindGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BottomRightGUI');
local mainFrame = keybindGUI.MainFrame;

local keybindFrame = mainFrame.KeybindFrame;

local PRESSED_DOWN_SIZE = UDim2.fromOffset(30, 30);
local DEFAULT_SIZE = UDim2.fromOffset(30, 32);

local TOGGLE_GUI_DESCRIPTION = 'Show/Hide Keybinds'

local components = keybindGUI.Components;
local keybindFramePrefab = components.KeybindFrame;

local KeybindController = {}

local bindedActions = {};

local playerSettings = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Settings');
local keybindVisibility = playerSettings:GetAttribute('KeybindsVisibility');

type KeybindData = {
    ActionName: string,
    Key: Enum.KeyCode,
    AdditionalKeys: {Enum.KeyCode}?,
    Description: string,
    OnPressed: (Enum.UserInputState, Enum.InputType) -> (),
    OnReleased: (Enum.UserInputState, Enum.InputType) -> ()?,
    CustomKeyText: string?,
    CreateMobileButton: boolean?
}

function KeybindController:BindKey(data: KeybindData)
    if table.find(bindedActions, data.ActionName) then
        warn(`Action {data.ActionName} already binded to a key!`);
        return;
    end;

    table.insert(bindedActions, data.ActionName);

    local keyFrame = keybindFramePrefab:Clone();
    local keyLabel = keyFrame.KeyLabel
    local descriptionLabel = keyFrame.DescriptionLabel;

    keyFrame.Parent = keybindFrame;

    keyLabel.Text = data.CustomKeyText or data.Key.Name;
    descriptionLabel.Text = data.Description;

    ContextActionUtility:BindAction(data.ActionName, function(action, inputState, inputObject)
        keyLabel.Size = inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin and PRESSED_DOWN_SIZE or DEFAULT_SIZE;

        if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
            data.OnPressed(inputState, inputObject)
        elseif inputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
            if data.OnReleased then
                data.OnReleased(inputState, inputObject)
            end
        end
    end, data.CreateMobileButton or false, data.Key, unpack(data.AdditionalKeys or {}));

    if data.CreateMobileButton == true then
        ContextActionUtility:SetTitle(data.ActionName, data.Description);
    end;

    return function()
        ContextActionUtility:UnbindAction(data.ActionName)
        table.remove(bindedActions, table.find(bindedActions, data.ActionName));
        keyFrame:Destroy();
    end
end

function KeybindController:Start()
    keybindFrame.Visible = keybindVisibility;
    playerSettings:GetAttributeChangedSignal('KeybindsVisibility'):Connect(function()
        keybindVisibility = playerSettings:GetAttribute('KeybindsVisibility');
        keybindFrame.Visible = keybindVisibility;
    end)
end

function KeybindController:Init()

end

return KeybindController

--[[
    LandmarkController (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local Players = game:GetService('Players');

local LandmarkController = {};
local Landmarks = {}
local LandmarkInstance = require(script:WaitForChild("Landmark"));

local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer;
local char;
local rootPart;

local function CharacterAdded(char_)
	if not char_ then return; end;
	char = char_;
	rootPart = char:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart');
end;

function LandmarkController:Start()
	for _,v in next, Landmarks do
		v.BillboardGUI.Enabled = localPlayer.Settings:GetAttribute('WaypointSetting')
	end
	localPlayer:WaitForChild('Settings'):GetAttributeChangedSignal('WaypointSetting'):Connect(function()
		for _,v in next, Landmarks do
			v.BillboardGUI.Enabled = localPlayer.Settings:GetAttribute('WaypointSetting');
		end
	end)
end;

function LandmarkController:Init()
	CharacterAdded(localPlayer.Character);
	localPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(CharacterAdded);
	
	for i,v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):WaitForChild("Landmarks"):GetChildren()) do
		if Landmarks[v.Name] == nil then
			Landmarks[v.Name] = LandmarkInstance.new(v)
		end
	end
	game:GetService("Workspace"):WaitForChild("Landmarks").ChildAdded:Connect(function(v)
		if Landmarks[v.Name] == nil then
			Landmarks[v.Name] = LandmarkInstance.new(v)
		end
	end)
	task.spawn(function()
		while task.wait(0.1) do
			if rootPart ~= nil then
				for i,v in next, Landmarks do
					v:Update(rootPart)
				end
			end
		end
	end)
end;

return LandmarkController;

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/LandmarkController_contents/Landmark.lua ---

--[[
    Landmark (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → LandmarkController
    Parent: LandmarkController
    ⚠️  NESTED SCRIPT: This script is inside another script
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local Landmark = {};
Landmark.__index = Landmark;

local localPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local interactionStorage = localPlayer.PlayerScripts:WaitForChild('Storage'):WaitForChild('Landmark');
local LandmarkGUI = interactionStorage.LandmarkGUI;

local playerSettings = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Settings');
local waypointSetting = playerSettings:GetAttribute('WaypointSetting');

function Landmark.new(part)
	local self = setmetatable({}, Landmark);
	
	self.Part = part
	self.BillboardGUI = LandmarkGUI:Clone()
	self.BillboardGUI.Parent = part
	self.BillboardGUI.Main.TextColor3 = part.BrickColor.Color
	
	return self;
end;

function Landmark:Destroy()
	self.BillboardGUI:Destroy()
end

function stm(s)
	return s/4
end

function Landmark:Update(HRP)
	if self.Part and HRP then
		local Mag = (self.Part.Position - HRP.Position).Magnitude
		if Mag > 1500 then self.BillboardGUI.Enabled = false return; end
		if Mag <= 200 then self.BillboardGUI.Enabled = false return; end
		self.BillboardGUI.Enabled = playerSettings:GetAttribute('WaypointSetting');
		self.BillboardGUI.Main.Text = self.Part.Name.." ("..tostring(math.round(stm(Mag))).."m)"
	end
end

function Landmark:Start()
	playerSettings:GetAttributeChangedSignal('WaypointSetting'):Connect(function()
		waypointSetting = playerSettings:GetAttribute('WaypointSetting');
	end)
end

return Landmark;

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/LeaderboardController.lua ---

--[[
    LeaderboardController (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local NetworkController;

local PREMIUM_MEMBERSHIP = Enum.MembershipType.Premium;

local newUDim2 = UDim2.new;
local tabKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.Tab;
local coroutineWrap = coroutine.wrap;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local players = {};

local DeveloperCheck;

local hiddenTeams = {
	--['Civilian'] = true,
};

local leaderboardGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('LeaderboardGUI');
local mainFrame = leaderboardGUI.MainFrame;
local playersFrame = mainFrame.PlayersFrame;
local listLayout = playersFrame.UIListLayout;
local nameLabel = mainFrame.NameLabel;
local components = leaderboardGUI.Components;

local playerFramePrefab = components.PlayerFrame
local teamFramePrefab = components.TeamFrame;

local function ResizePlayersFrame()
	local totalY = 0;
	for i, v in next, playersFrame:GetChildren() do
		if v:IsA('ImageLabel') and v.Visible then
			totalY = totalY + v.Size.Y.Offset + 3;
		end;
	end;
	playersFrame.CanvasSize = newUDim2(0, 0, 0, totalY);
	--playersFrame.Size = newUDim2(1, 0, 0, totalY + 3);
end;

local function AddTeamFrames()
	local teams = game:GetService('Teams'):GetChildren()

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		table.sort(teams, function(a, b)
			-- if a.Name == "Civilian" then
			-- 	return (string.rep("0", 5) .. string.rep("A", 5)) > b.Name
			-- end
			return a.Name < b.Name
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn(`Failed to sort teams: {err}`)
	end

	for i, v in teams do
		local teamName = v.Name;
		local teamFrame = teamFramePrefab:Clone();
		teamFrame.Name = teamName;
		teamFrame.NameLabel.Text = teamName;
		teamFrame.ImageColor3 = v.TeamColor.Color;
		teamFrame.Visible = false;
		teamFrame.LayoutOrder = if teamName == "Civilian" then 0 else i;
		teamFrame:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Visible'):Connect(ResizePlayersFrame);
		v:GetPropertyChangedSignal('TeamColor'):Connect(function()
			teamFrame.ImageColor3 = v.TeamColor.Color;
		end);
		teamFrame.Parent = playersFrame;
	end;

	local n = 900
	game:GetService('Teams').ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
		if playersFrame[child.Name] then return end;

		local teamName = child.Name;
		local teamFrame = teamFramePrefab:Clone();
		teamFrame.Name = teamName;
		teamFrame.NameLabel.Text = teamName;
		teamFrame.ImageColor3 = child.TeamColor.Color;
		teamFrame.Visible = false;
		n += 1;
		teamFrame.LayoutOrder = n;
		teamFrame:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Visible'):Connect(ResizePlayersFrame);
		child:GetPropertyChangedSignal('TeamColor'):Connect(function()
			teamFrame.ImageColor3 = child.TeamColor.Color;
		end);
		teamFrame.Parent = playersFrame;
	end)
end;

local function TeamPlayer(name, team)
	if not players[name] then return; end;

	local oldTeam = players[name][3];
	local newTeam = playersFrame[team];
	if hiddenTeams[newTeam.Name] then return; end;

	if not newTeam.Visible then
		newTeam.Visible = true;
	end;
	players[name][1].LayoutOrder = newTeam.LayoutOrder;
	players[name][3] = team;

	if oldTeam then
		local found = false;
		for i, v in next, players do
			if v[3] == oldTeam then
				found = true;
				break;
			end;
		end;
		if not found then
			playersFrame[oldTeam].Visible = false;
		end;
	end;
end;

local function AddPlayerFrame(name, premium, developer, isFriends, moderator, verified)
	local playerFrame = playerFramePrefab:Clone();
	playerFrame.NameLabel.Text = if verified then `{name}\u{E000}` else name;
	playerFrame.PremiumImage.Visible = premium;
	if developer then
		playerFrame.PremiumImage.Visible = false;
		playerFrame.DeveloperImage.Visible = true;
	end;
	if moderator and not developer then
		playerFrame.PremiumImage.Visible = false;
		playerFrame.ModeratorImage.Visible = true;
	end
	if isFriends then
		playerFrame.FriendImage.Visible = true;
		if premium or developer or moderator then
			playerFrame.NameLabel.Position += UDim2.fromOffset(20, 0);
		else
			playerFrame.FriendImage.Position = playerFrame.PremiumImage.Position;
		end;
	end;
	playerFrame.Parent = playersFrame;
	return playerFrame;
end;

local function RemovePlayer(name)
	local playerData = players[name];
	if not playerData then return; end;

	local oldTeam = playerData[3];
	playerData[2]:Disconnect();
	playerData[1]:Destroy();
	players[name] = nil;

	if oldTeam then
		local found = false;
		for i, v in next, players do
			if v[3] == oldTeam then
				found = true;
				break;
			end;
		end;
		if not found then
			playersFrame[oldTeam].Visible = false;
		end;
	end;
end;

local function CheckInput(input, onGUI)
	if onGUI then return; end;

	if input.KeyCode == tabKeyCode then
		leaderboardGUI.Enabled = not leaderboardGUI.Enabled;
	end;
end;

local function GetPlayerInfo(plr: Player)
	if not plr then return; end;
	local team;

	if not plr.Team then
		repeat
			task.wait();
			if not plr then return; end;
		until plr.Team;
	end;

	team = plr.Team.Name;

	local ok, isFriends = pcall(localPlayer.IsFriendsWith, localPlayer, plr.UserId);
	if not ok then
		warn(`Could not check friend status for {plr.Name}: {isFriends}`)
		isFriends = false
	end

	local isAdmin = plr:GetAttribute('ModBadge') == true;

	return plr.Name, plr.MembershipType == PREMIUM_MEMBERSHIP, team, DeveloperCheck(plr), isFriends, isAdmin, plr.HasVerifiedBadge;
end;

local function Joined(plr)
	local name, premium, team, developer, isFriends, isAdmin, verified = GetPlayerInfo(plr);
	if players[name] then return; end;
	players[name] = {
		AddPlayerFrame(name, premium, developer, isFriends, isAdmin, verified),
		plr:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Team'):Connect(function()
			TeamPlayer(name, plr.Team.Name);
		end)
	};
	TeamPlayer(name, team);
end;

local function Left(plr)
	RemovePlayer(plr.Name);
end;

local LeaderboardController = {};

function LeaderboardController:Start()
local UserInputService = game:GetService('UserInputService');
	if UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
		leaderboardGUI.Enabled = false
        return
    end

	listLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal('AbsoluteContentSize'):Connect(ResizePlayersFrame);

	AddTeamFrames();

	nameLabel.Text = localPlayer.Name;

	game:GetService('UserInputService').InputBegan:Connect(CheckInput);

	for i, v in next, game:GetService('Players'):GetPlayers() do
		coroutineWrap(Joined)(v);
	end;

	NetworkController.Connect('PlayerJoined', Joined);
	NetworkController.Connect('PlayerLeft', Left);
end;

function LeaderboardController:Init()
	DeveloperCheck = self.Shared.DeveloperCheck;
	NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
	coroutineWrap(function()
		while true do
			local suc = pcall(function()
				game:GetService('StarterGui'):SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.PlayerList, false);
			end);
			if suc then break; end;
			wait();
		end;
	end)();
end;

return LeaderboardController;

--[[

-- Motorbike Controller
-- Khizzer
-- July 26, 2022

local Signal;

local MotorbikeController = {}

local Motorbike;
local NetworkController;
local ConvertSpeed;

local bikeObject;

local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera;

function MotorbikeController:GetSpeed()
    if not bikeObject then return 0; end;

    return ConvertSpeed(bikeObject.Platform.Velocity.Magnitude, true);
end;

function MotorbikeController:GetMaxSpeed()
    if not bikeObject then return 0; end;

    return ConvertSpeed(bikeObject.Gears[bikeObject.Gear], true);
end;

function MotorbikeController:Start()
    self.GearChanged = Signal.new();

    NetworkController.Connect('Motorbike', function(event, ...)
        if event == 'Enter' then
			bikeObject = Motorbike.new(...);
			camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Track;
        elseif event == 'Exit' then
			bikeObject:DisconnectBike();
        end;
    end);
end;

function MotorbikeController:Init()
    Signal = self.Shared.Signal;
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    Motorbike = self:WrapModule(require(script:WaitForChild('Motorbike')));
    ConvertSpeed = self.Shared.ConvertSpeed;
end;


return MotorbikeController

-- Motorbike
-- Khizzer
-- July 26, 2022

local ContextActionService = game:GetService('ContextActionService');
local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');

local NetworkController;
local Trove;
local MotorbikeGUI;
local MotorbikeController;
local ConvertSpeed;

local MAX_STEER_ANGLE = 35;
local MIN_STEER_ANGLE = 10;

local tonumber = tonumber;
local require = require;
local mathAbs = math.abs;
local mathTan = math.tan;
local mathDeg = math.deg;
local mathAtan2 = math.atan2;
local mathRad = math.rad;
local mathClamp = math.clamp;
local coroutineWrap = coroutine.wrap;
local newVector3 = Vector3.new;
local newInstance = Instance.new;
local newPhysicalProperties = PhysicalProperties.new;
local beginInputState = Enum.UserInputState.Begin;
local endInputState = Enum.UserInputState.End;

local RKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.R;
local FKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.F;
local LKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.L;
local QKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.Q;
local EKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.E;
local XKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.X;
local HKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.H;
local CKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.C;
local PKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.P;
local GKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.G;
local VKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.V;
local shiftKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift;

local tweenCreate = TweenService.Create;
local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(0.18, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out);
local tweenInfo1 = TweenInfo.new(0.11, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out);

local postSimulation = game:GetService('RunService').Heartbeat;

local ConvertSpeed;
local Map;
local PID;

local Motorbike = {}
Motorbike.__index = Motorbike

function Motorbike.new(motorbike, isEmergencyBike)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Motorbike)

    self.Motorbike = motorbike;
	self.Config = motorbike.Config;

    self.Chassis = motorbike.Chassis;
    self.Platform = self.Chassis.Platform;
    self.Wheels = self.Chassis.Wheels;
    self.Seat = self.Chassis.VehicleSeat;

	local mass = self.Chassis.Mass;
	local stabiliserAttachment = mass.StabiliserAttachment;
	local stabiliser: VectorForce = stabiliserAttachment.Stabiliser;
	self.Stabiliser = stabiliser

	local balancePID = PID.new(-100000, 100000, 500, 0, 5000);
	self.BalancePID = balancePID;

--[[     self.IsEmergencyBike = isEmergencyBike;
    self.ELSPatterns = isEmergencyBike and self.Config.ELSPatterns;
    self.Sirens = self.Platforms:FindFirstChild('Sirens'); ]]

    self.AttachmentF = self.Platform.AttachmentF;
    self.AttachmentR = self.Platform.AttachmentR;

    self.CylindricalF = self.Platform.CylindricalF;
    self.CylindricalR = self.Platform.CylindricalR;

    self.WheelF = self.Wheels.WheelF;
    self.WheelR = self.Wheels.WheelR;

	self.WheelRadius = self.WheelF.Wheel.Size.X * 0.5;

	local tuning = self.Config.Tuning;
	self.BrakeTorque = tuning.BrakeTorque.Value;
	self.IdleTorque = tuning.IdleTorque.Value;
	self.AccelerationTorque = tuning.AccelerateTorque.Value;
	self.Acceleration = tuning.Acceleration.Value;
	self.IdleDeceleration = tuning.IdleDeceleration.Value;
	self.BrakeDeceleration = tuning.BrakeDeceleration.Value;

	self.Gears = require(self.Config.Modules.Gears);
	self.NumberOfGears = #self.Gears;
	self.LastGearSpeed = ConvertSpeed(self.Gears[self.NumberOfGears]);
	self.Gear = 3;
	self.MaxSpeed = ConvertSpeed(self.Gears[self.Gear]);

    self.SteerGoals = {};

	self.TiltAngle = 0;

    self:SetupDifferential();
    self:SetupListeners();
	self:Enable();

    return self
end;

function Motorbike:SetupDifferential()
    local drivetrain = self.Motorbike:GetAttribute('Drivetrain');
	local platform = self.Platform;
	local cylindricalF = platform.CylindricalF;
	local cylindricalR = platform.CylindricalR;

	if drivetrain == 'AWD' then
		function self:ModifyCylinderConstraint(torque, angularVelocity, angularAcceleration)
			cylindricalF.MotorMaxTorque = torque;

			cylindricalF.AngularVelocity = angularVelocity;

			--cylindricalF.MotorMaxAngularAcceleration = angularAcceleration;

			if self.Drifting then return; end;

			cylindricalR.MotorMaxTorque = torque;

			cylindricalR.AngularVelocity = angularVelocity;

			--cylindricalR.MotorMaxAngularAcceleration = angularAcceleration;
		end;
--[[ 	elseif drivetrain == 'FWD' then  --This is not physically possible
		function self:ModifyCylinderConstraint(torque, angularVelocity, angularAcceleration)
			cylindricalFL.MotorMaxTorque = torque;
			cylindricalFR.MotorMaxTorque = torque;

			cylindricalFL.AngularVelocity = angularVelocity;
			cylindricalFR.AngularVelocity = -angularVelocity;

			cylindricalFR.MotorMaxAngularAcceleration = angularAcceleration;
			cylindricalFL.MotorMaxAngularAcceleration = angularAcceleration;
		end; ]]
	elseif drivetrain == 'RWD' then
		function self:ModifyCylinderConstraint(torque, angularVelocity, angularAcceleration)
			if self.Drifting then return; end;

			cylindricalR.MotorMaxTorque = torque;

			cylindricalR.AngularVelocity = angularVelocity;

			--cylindricalR.MotorMaxAngularAcceleration = angularAcceleration;
		end;
	end;
end;

function Motorbike:KeepBalanced()
	local tilt = self.Platform.Orientation.Z;
	local desiredTilt = self.TiltAngle
	local force = self.BalancePID:Calculate(desiredTilt, tilt);
	self.Stabiliser.Force = Vector3.new(0, 0, force);
end;

function Motorbike:Throttle()
    local platform = self.Platform;
	local gear = self.Gear;
	local seat = self.Seat;
	local throttle = seat.ThrottleFloat;
    local torque = seat.Torque;
	local maxSpeed = self.MaxSpeed;
    local speed;
	local angularAcceleration;

	local config = self.Config;
	local gas = config.State.Gas;

	if gas.Value <= 0 then
		if gear >= 4 then
			gear = 3;
			maxSpeed = ConvertSpeed(self.Gears[3]);
		end;
	end;

    if not self.ParkingBrake then
		if throttle > 0 then
			angularAcceleration = self.Acceleration;
			speed = maxSpeed / self.WheelRadius;
			if gear > 2 then
				torque = self.AccelerationTorque * Map(gear, 3, self.NumberOfGears, 1, 0.8);
			elseif gear == 1 then
				torque = self.AccelerationTorque
			end;
		elseif throttle < 0 then
			speed = 0;
			torque = torque + Map(platform.Velocity.Magnitude, 0, maxSpeed, 4000, 13000);
			angularAcceleration = self.BrakeDeceleration;
		else
			speed = 0;
			torque = self.IdleTorque;
			angularAcceleration = self.BrakeDeceleration;
		end;

		local occupant = seat.Occupant;
		speed = occupant and speed or 0;
		torque = occupant and torque or 8000;

		self:ModifyCylinderConstraint(torque, speed, angularAcceleration);
	else
		self:ModifyCylinderConstraint(50000, 0, 100)
	end
end;

function Motorbike:SteerTween(attachment, angle)
	if self.SteerGoals[attachment] == angle then return; end;
	self.SteerGoals[attachment] = angle;
	tweenCreate(TweenService, attachment, (angle == 0) and tweenInfo1 or tweenInfo, {Orientation = newVector3(0, angle, -90)}):Play();
end;

function Motorbike:Steer()
--	debug.profilebegin('CarSteer');
	local platform = self.Platform;
	local steer = -self.Seat.SteerFloat * Map(platform.Velocity.Magnitude, 0, self.LastGearSpeed, MAX_STEER_ANGLE, MIN_STEER_ANGLE);
	local attachmentF = platform.AttachmentF;
    local attachmentR = platform.AttachmentR;

	if steer ~= 0 then
		local radians = mathRad(90 - mathAbs(steer));
		local h = (attachmentF.WorldPosition - attachmentR.WorldPosition).Magnitude;
		local z = (attachmentR.WorldPosition - attachmentR.WorldPosition).Magnitude;
		local x = mathTan(radians) * h;
		local y = x + z;
		local outerTurnAngle = 90 - mathDeg(mathAtan2(y, h));

		if steer > 0 then
			self:SteerTween(attachmentF, steer);
			self.TiltAngle = 30;
		else
			outerTurnAngle = -outerTurnAngle;
			self:SteerTween(attachmentF, steer);
			self.TiltAngle = -30;
		end;
	else
		self:SteerTween(attachmentF, 0);
		self:SteerTween(attachmentR, 0);
		self.TiltAngle = 0;
	end;
--	debug.profileend();
end;

function Motorbike:ChangeGear(actionName, inputState)
	if inputState and inputState ~= beginInputState then return; end;

	local oldGear = self.Gear;
	local newGear = mathClamp((actionName == 'ShiftUp') and (oldGear + 1) or (oldGear - 1), 1, self.NumberOfGears);
	self.Gear = newGear;
	self.MaxSpeed = ConvertSpeed(self.Gears[newGear]);
	MotorbikeController.GearChanged:Fire(newGear);
	--CarGUI.SetGear(oldGear, newGear);

--[[ 	if newGear == 1 then
		NetworkController.Send('Car', 'Reverselights', true);
	elseif newGear == 2 then
		NetworkController.Send('Car', 'Reverselights', false);
	end; ]]
end;

function Motorbike:SetupListeners()
	self.Trove = Trove.new();

    local trove = self.Trove;

    trove:Add(postSimulation:Connect(function()
		self:KeepBalanced();
        self:Throttle();
        self:Steer();
    end));

    trove:Add(self.Motorbike.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
        self:DisconnectBike();
    end))

	trove:Add(function()
		MotorbikeGUI:Disable();
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('ShiftUp');
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('ShiftDown');
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('SetHeadlights');
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('SetIndicator');
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('SetHazards');
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('ParkingBrake');
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('Honk');
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('Lock');
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction('Drift');
	end);

	ContextActionService:BindAction('ShiftUp', function(...)
		self:ChangeGear(...)
	end, false, RKeyCode);
    ContextActionService:BindAction('ShiftDown', function(...)
		self:ChangeGear(...);
	end, false, FKeyCode);
    ContextActionService:BindAction('SetHeadlights', function(...)
		self.SetHeadlights(...);
	end, false, LKeyCode);
    ContextActionService:BindAction('SetIndicator', function(...)
		self.SetIndicator(...);
	end, false, QKeyCode, EKeyCode);
    ContextActionService:BindAction('SetHazards', function(...)
		self.SetHazards(...);
	end, false, XKeyCode);
    ContextActionService:BindAction('ParkingBrake', function(...)
		self:SetParkingBrake(...);
	end, false, PKeyCode, GKeyCode);
    ContextActionService:BindAction('Honk', function(...)
		self.Honk(...);
	end, false, HKeyCode, CKeyCode);
	ContextActionService:BindAction('Lock', function(...)
		self.Lock(...);
	end, false, VKeyCode);
	ContextActionService:BindAction('Drift', function(...)
		self:Drift(...);
	end, false, shiftKeyCode);
end;

function Motorbike:Enable()
	MotorbikeGUI:Enable();
end;

function Motorbike:DisconnectBike()
    self.Trove:Destroy();
    self.Trove = nil;

    self.SteerGoals = nil;
end;

function Motorbike:Init()
	MotorbikeController = self.Controllers.Motorbike.MotorbikeController;
	MotorbikeGUI = self.Controllers.Motorbike.MotorbikeGUI;
    Map = self.Shared.Map;
    Trove = self.Shared.Trove;
	PID = self.Shared.PID;
	ConvertSpeed = self.Shared.ConvertSpeed;
end;


return Motorbike

-- MotorbikeGUI
-- Khizzer
-- June 26, 2023

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local UIComponent;


local motorbikeGUI = Instance.new('ScreenGui');
motorbikeGUI.Name = 'MotorbikeGUI';
local UIScale = Instance.new('UIScale');
UIScale.Parent = motorbikeGUI;
motorbikeGUI.Parent = localPlayer.PlayerGui;

local mainFrame;

local MotorbikeGUI = {}

function MotorbikeGUI:Enable()
    if not mainFrame then
        mainFrame = UIComponent({
            Parent = motorbikeGUI;
        });
    end;
end;

function MotorbikeGUI:Disable()
    if mainFrame then mainFrame:Destroy(); end;
    mainFrame = nil;
end;

function MotorbikeGUI:Init()
    UIComponent = self.Fusion.UI.MotorbikeGUI;
end;


return MotorbikeGUI

--[[
    PolicyController (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local CollectionService = game:GetService('CollectionService');
local PolicyService = game:GetService('PolicyService');

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local PolicyController = {};

local ExternalReferencesFolder = Instance.new('Folder');
ExternalReferencesFolder.Name = 'ExternalReferences';
ExternalReferencesFolder.Parent = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage');

type PolicyInfo = {
    AreAdsAllowed: boolean;
    ArePaidRandomItemsRestricted: boolean;
    AllowedExternalLinkReferences: {string};
    IsPaidItemTradingAllowed: boolean;
    IsSubjectToChinaPolicies: boolean;
};

local PolicyInfo: PolicyInfo?;

function PolicyController:Start()
    CollectionService:GetInstanceAddedSignal('DiscordReference'):Connect(function(instance)
        if not PolicyInfo then instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder; return; end;
        if table.find(PolicyInfo.AllowedExternalLinkReferences, 'Discord') == nil then
            instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder;
        end;
    end);

    CollectionService:GetInstanceAddedSignal('FacebookReference'):Connect(function(instance)
        if not PolicyInfo then instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder; return; end;
        if table.find(PolicyInfo.AllowedExternalLinkReferences, 'Facebook') == nil then
            instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder;
        end;
    end);

    CollectionService:GetInstanceAddedSignal('TwitchReference'):Connect(function(instance)
        if not PolicyInfo then instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder; return; end;
        if table.find(PolicyInfo.AllowedExternalLinkReferences, 'Twitch') == nil then
            instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder;
        end;
    end);

    CollectionService:GetInstanceAddedSignal('YoutubeReference'):Connect(function(instance)
        if not PolicyInfo then instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder; return; end;
        if table.find(PolicyInfo.AllowedExternalLinkReferences, 'Youtube') == nil then
            instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder;
        end;
    end);

    CollectionService:GetInstanceAddedSignal('ImmersiveAd'):Connect(function(instance)
        if not PolicyInfo then instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder; return; end;
        if not PolicyInfo.AreAdsAllowed then
            instance.Parent = ExternalReferencesFolder;
        end;
    end)
end;

function PolicyController:Init()
    coroutine.wrap(function()
		while true do
			local suc = pcall(function()
				PolicyInfo = PolicyService:GetPolicyInfoForPlayerAsync(localPlayer);
			end);
			if suc then break; end;
			task.wait();
		end;
	end)();
end;

return PolicyController

local NetworkController;
local StopIds;

local StopAnnoucementController = {}

function StopAnnoucementController:Start()
	NetworkController.Connect('BUS_STOP_ANNOUNCEMENT', function(text)
        local soundId = StopIds[text];
        if not soundId then return end;
        local sound = Instance.new('Sound');
        sound.SoundId = 'rbxassetid://'..soundId;

    end);
end

	NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    StopIds = self.Shared.Constants.TranslinkStopIds.Stops;
end


return StopAnnoucementController

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/TaskScheduler.lua ---

--[[
    TaskScheduler (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Author: EchoReaper
-- Roblox Link: https://www.roblox.com/Task-Scheduler-item?id=348019935
-- Publically released January 25, 2016

-- Changes made from EchoReaper's version:
	-- GetCurrentFPS() method removed
	-- FPS is only tracked when the 'Loop' function is running for performance reasons
	-- Styled code in consistency with the rest of the AeroGameFramework codebase

--[[
	
	local scheduler = TaskScheduler:CreateScheduler(targetedMinimumFPS)
	
	scheduler:QueueTask(function)
	scheduler:Pause()
	scheduler:Resume()
	scheduler:Destroy()
	
--]]




local TaskScheduler = {}

local lastIteration
local frameUpdateTable = {}

local runService = game:GetService("RunService")

--[[
	param targetFps  Task scheduler won't run a task if it'd make the FPS drop below this amount
					 (WARNING) this only holds true if it is used properly. If you try to complete 10 union operations
					 at once in a single task then of course your FPS is going to drop -- queue the union operations
					 up one at a time so the task scheduler can do its job.
					
					
	returns scheduler
		method Pause      Pauses the scheduler so it won't run tasks. Tasks may still be added while the scheduler is
						  paused. They just won't be touched until it's resumed. Performance efficient -- disables
						  execution loop entirely until scheduler is resumed.
		
		method Resume     Resumes the paused scheduler.
		
		method Destroy    Destroys the scheduler so it can't be used anymore.
		
		method QueueTask  Queues a task for automatic execution.
			param callback  function (task) to be run.
	
	Example usage:
	
	local scheduler = TaskScheduler:CreateScheduler(60)
	local totalOperations = 0
	local paused
	for i=1,100 do
		scheduler:QueueTask(function()
			local partA = Instance.new("Part", workspace)
			local partB = Instance.new("Part", workspace)
			plugin:Union({partA, partB}):Destroy()
			totalOperations = totalOperations + 1
			print("Times unioned:", totalOperations)
			if (totalOperations == 50) then
				scheduler:Pause()
				paused = true
			end
		end)
	end
	
	repeat wait() until paused
	wait(2)
	scheduler:Resume()
--]]


function TaskScheduler:CreateScheduler(targetFps)
	
	local scheduler = {}
	local queue = {}
	local sleeping = true
	local paused
	
	local updateFrameTableEvent = nil
	
	local start = time()
	runService.PreRender:Wait()
	
	local function UpdateFrameTable()
		lastIteration = time()
		for i = #frameUpdateTable,1,-1 do
			frameUpdateTable[i + 1] = ((frameUpdateTable[i] >= (lastIteration - 1)) and frameUpdateTable[i] or nil)
		end
		frameUpdateTable[1] = lastIteration
	end

	local function Loop()
		updateFrameTableEvent = runService.PreRender:Connect(UpdateFrameTable)
		while (true) do
			if (sleeping) then break end
			local fps = (((time() - start) >= 1 and #frameUpdateTable) or (#frameUpdateTable / (time() - start)))
			if (fps >= targetFps and (time() - frameUpdateTable[1]) < (1 / targetFps)) then
				if (#queue > 0) then
					queue[1]()
					table.remove(queue, 1)
				else
					sleeping = true
					break
				end
			else
				runService.PreRender:Wait()
			end
		end
		updateFrameTableEvent:Disconnect()
		updateFrameTableEvent = nil
	end

	function scheduler.Pause(_s)
		paused = true
		sleeping = true
	end
	
	function scheduler.Resume(_s)
		if (paused) then
			paused = false
			sleeping = false
			Loop()
		end
	end
	
	function scheduler.Destroy(_s)
		scheduler:Pause()
		for i in pairs(scheduler) do
			scheduler[i] = nil
		end
		setmetatable(scheduler, {
			__index = function()
				error("Attempt to use destroyed scheduler")
			end;
			__newindex = function()
				error("Attempt to use destroyed scheduler")
			end;
		})
	end
	
	function scheduler.QueueTask(_s, callback)
		queue[#queue + 1] = callback
		if (sleeping and not paused) then
			sleeping = false
			Loop()
		end
	end
	
	return scheduler
	
end


return TaskScheduler

--[[
    ToolController (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local tableRemove = table.remove;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local initiatedTools = {};

local tools;

local function IsInitiatedTool(tool)
    for i, v in next, initiatedTools do
        if v[1] == tool then
            return i;
        end;
    end;
end;

local function CheckTool(tool)
    if IsInitiatedTool(tool) then return; end;

    local linkedModule = tool:GetAttribute('Module');
    if not linkedModule then return; end;

    local toolModule = tools[linkedModule].new(tool);

    local index = #initiatedTools + 1;
    initiatedTools[index] = {tool, toolModule};
    tool:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Parent'):Connect(function()
        if not tool.Parent then
            tableRemove(initiatedTools, index);
        end;
    end);

    toolModule.IsEquipped = true;
    toolModule:Equipped();

	tool.Equipped:Connect(function()
		if not toolModule.IsEquipped then
        	toolModule.IsEquipped = true;
			toolModule:Equipped();
		end;
    end);
    tool.Activated:Connect(function()
        toolModule:Activated();
    end);
    tool.Deactivated:Connect(function()
        toolModule:Deactivated();
    end);
    tool.Unequipped:Connect(function()
        toolModule.IsEquipped = false;
        toolModule:Unequipped();
    end);
end;





local ToolController = {};

function ToolController:CharacterAdded(char)
    if not char then return; end;
    initiatedTools = {};
    char:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Died:Connect(function()
        for i, v in next, initiatedTools do
            local toolModule = v[2];
            if toolModule.IsEquipped then
                toolModule.IsEquipped = false;
                toolModule:Unequipped();
            end;
        end;
    end);
end

function ToolController:Start()

    game:GetService('ContextActionService').LocalToolEquipped:Connect(function(tool)
        CheckTool(tool);
    end);
end;

function ToolController:Init()
    tools = self.Modules.Tools;
end;

return ToolController;

-- Topbar Controller
-- Khizzer
-- February 22, 2024

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage');
local GuiService = game:GetService('GuiService');

local SettingsGUI;
local HotbarLayoutGUI;
local InventoryGUI;
local TopbarPlus;

local TopbarController = {}


local topLeft: Vector2 = GuiService:GetGuiInset()
local isNewTopbar = topLeft.Y == 58 -- old topbar = 36

local UIShelf = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.uishelf);


function TopbarController:Start()
	if isNewTopbar then
        local inventoryOpener = UIShelf.Icon({
            Name = 'InventoryOpener',
            Order = 1;
            Image = 9677383822;
            Area = UIShelf.Area.Left
        });

        inventoryOpener.Activated:Connect(InventoryGUI.ExtraFrameToggle);
        inventoryOpener:BindKeyCode(Enum.KeyCode.Backquote);

        local settingsBtn = UIShelf.Icon({
            Name = 'SettingsBtn',
            Order = 2;
            Image = 3216967985;
            Area = UIShelf.Area.Left;
        });

        settingsBtn.Activated:Connect(SettingsGUI.Toggle);

        local layoutsBtn = UIShelf.Icon({
            Name = 'LayoutsBtn',
            Order = 3;
            Image = 7089862538;
            Area = UIShelf.Area.Left;
        });

        layoutsBtn.Activated:Connect(HotbarLayoutGUI.Toggle);
        layoutsBtn:BindKeyCode(Enum.KeyCode.B);
        layoutsBtn:SetTooltip('View and manage saved hotbar layouts');

    else
        --Use old topbar plus stuff
        local inventoryOpener = TopbarPlus.new()
        :setImage(9677383822)
        :setTip('Open inventory')
        :bindEvent('selected', function()
            InventoryGUI.ExtraFrameToggle();
        end)
        :bindEvent('deselected', function()
            InventoryGUI.ExtraFrameToggle();
        end)
        :bindToggleKey(Enum.KeyCode.Backquote)

        local settingsBtn = TopbarPlus.new()
        :setImage(3216967985)
        :bindEvent('selected', function()
            SettingsGUI:Toggle();
        end)
        :bindEvent('deselected', function()
            SettingsGUI:Toggle();
        end);

        local backpackManager = TopbarPlus.new()
        :setImage(7089862538)
        :setLabel('Hotbar layouts')
        :setTip('View and manage saved hotbar layouts')
        :bindEvent('selected', function()
            HotbarLayoutGUI:Toggle();
        end)
        :bindEvent('deselected', function()
            HotbarLayoutGUI:Toggle();
        end)
        :bindToggleKey(Enum.KeyCode.B);
    end
end


function TopbarController:Init()
	SettingsGUI = self.Controllers.UI.SettingsGUI;
    HotbarLayoutGUI = self.Controllers.UI.HotbarLayoutGUI;
    InventoryGUI = self.Controllers.UI.InventoryGUI;
    TopbarPlus = self.Modules.UI.TopbarPlus;
end


return TopbarController

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/TowWinchReplicationController.lua ---

--[[
    TowWinchReplicationController (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
--Tow Winch Replication Controller
--Khizzer
--January 25, 2023

local NetworkController;

local TowWinchReplicationController = {};

local GetAttachmentWorldPosition;
local Functions;

local troves = {};

local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer;

type receivedData = {
    Player: Player;
    WinchTool: Tool;
    BedPart: Part
};

local Trove = require(ReplicatedStorage.Aero.Shared.Trove);

function TowWinchReplicationController:Cleanup()
end;

function TowWinchReplicationController:Start()
    NetworkController.Connect('TowTruckWinch', function(data: receivedData)
        local plr = data.Player;
        local winchTool = data.WinchTool;
        local bedPart = data.BedPart;

        local winch: Tool = plr.Character:FindFirstChild('Winch');

        local trove = Trove.new();

        if not winch then
            trove:Clean();
        end;

        trove:AttachToInstance(plr);

        local fakePart: Part = Functions:Create'Part' {
            Size = bedPart.Size;
            CFrame = bedPart.CFrame;
            Transparency = 1;
            Parent = workspace;
        };

        local bodyPosition: BodyPosition = Functions:Create'BodyPosition' {
            MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, math.huge, math.huge);
            D = 10000;
            Position = bedPart.Position;
            Parent = fakePart
        };

        fakePart.CanCollide = false;

        local rope: RopeConstraint = winchTool.Handle.RopeConstraint;

        do
            local attachment0Pos = GetAttachmentWorldPosition(bedPart.Attachment);
            local attachment1Pos = GetAttachmentWorldPosition(rope.Attachment1);

            local distanceBetweenAttachments = (attachment0Pos - attachment1Pos);
            local distanceBetweenAttachmentsMagnitude = distanceBetweenAttachments.Magnitude;

            rope.Length = distanceBetweenAttachmentsMagnitude + 0.5;
        end;

        rope.Attachment0 = bedPart.Attachment;

        trove:Add(fakePart);
        trove:Add(bodyPosition);

        if plr == localPlayer then
            trove:Add(winchTool);
        end

        trove:BindToRenderStep('TowWinchReplicationController', Enum.RenderPriority.Last.Value, function()
            if not rope then
                trove:Clean();
            end;
            if not rope.Attachment0 then
                trove:Clean();
            end;
            
            local attachment0Pos = GetAttachmentWorldPosition(rope.Attachment0);
            local attachment1Pos = GetAttachmentWorldPosition(rope.Attachment1);

            local distanceBetweenAttachments = (attachment0Pos - attachment1Pos);
            local distanceBetweenAttachmentsMagnitude = distanceBetweenAttachments.Magnitude;

            rope.Length = distanceBetweenAttachmentsMagnitude + 0.3;
        end);

        trove:Add(winchTool.Unequipped:Connect(function()
            task.wait(.5);
            trove:Clean();
            rope.Attachment0 = nil;
        end));
    end)
end;

function TowWinchReplicationController:Init()
    Functions = self.Shared.Functions;
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    local AttachmentUtil = self.Shared.AttachmentUtil;
    GetAttachmentWorldPosition = AttachmentUtil.GetAttachmentWorldPosition;
end;

return TowWinchReplicationController;

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/TrackController.lua ---

--[[
    TrackController (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers
    Parent: Controllers
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local Trove = require(ReplicatedStorage.Aero.Shared.Trove)

local TrackController = { Tracking = false }

local trove = Trove.new()
local tracks = {}

local function createTrack(rootPart: Model)
  local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(rootPart.Parent)
  if not player then
    return
  end
  if tracks[player] then
    tracks[player]:Destroy()
  end

  local track = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
  track.Adornee = rootPart
  track.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
  track.ResetOnSpawn = false
  track.Enabled = true
  track.AlwaysOnTop = true
  track.PlayerToHideFrom = player

  local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
  label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
  label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
  label.Visible = true
  label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamMedium
  label.Text = player.Name
  label.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  label.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
  label.TextSize = 16
  label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
  label.Parent = track

  track.Parent = workspace
  tracks[player] = track
  trove:Add(track, "Destroy")
  return track
end

function TrackController:StartTracking()
  if self.Tracking then
    return
  end

  self.Tracking = true

  for _, part in CollectionService:GetTagged("HRT") do
    createTrack(part)
  end
  trove:Add(CollectionService:GetInstanceAddedSignal("HRT"):Connect(createTrack))
end

function TrackController:StopTracking()
  trove:Clean()
  self.Tracking = false
end

function TrackController:Start()
end

function TrackController:Init()
end

return TrackController

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/UI/AdminGUI.lua ---

--[[
    AdminGUI (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → UI
    Parent: UI
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- AdminGUI
-- Khizzer
-- January 7, 2022



local AdminGUI = {}
local NetworkController;

local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');
local DEFAULT_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 1.5);
local ACTIVE_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5);
local TWEEN_INFO = TweenInfo.new(0.23);

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local adminGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('AdminGUI');

local messageFrame = adminGUI.MessageFrame;
local messageLabel = messageFrame.BodyFrame.MessageImage.MessageLabel;
local messageOpenTween = TweenService:Create(messageFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = ACTIVE_POSITION});
local messageCloseTween = TweenService:Create(messageFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = DEFAULT_POSITION});

local thread;


function AdminGUI:Start()
    NetworkController.Connect('ServerShutdownMessage', function(developer)
        if thread then
            task.cancel(thread);
        end;
        messageOpenTween:Play();
        messageFrame.TopBarFrame.TitleLabel.Text = `Server Shutdown - {developer.Name}`;
        messageLabel.Text = `A server shutdown has been initialised by developer {developer.Name}. All civilians on jobs will be awarded their money and taken off their jobs. A 60 second window is being given to end roleplays and log shifts before we shut the server down. Any automated patrol logs are not guaranteed to be logged if you do not manually end them now.`;
    end)

    NetworkController.Connect('PermanentAdminMessage', function(title, message)
        if thread then
            task.cancel(thread);
        end;
        messageOpenTween:Play();
        messageFrame.TopBarFrame.TitleLabel.Text = title;
        messageLabel.Text = message;
    end)

    NetworkController.Connect('ADMIN_MESSAGE', function(title, message)
        if thread then
            task.cancel(thread);
        end;
        messageOpenTween:Play();
        messageFrame.TopBarFrame.TitleLabel.Text = title;
        messageLabel.Text = message;
        local waitTime = (#tostring(message) / 19) + 2.5;

        thread = task.delay(waitTime, function()
            messageCloseTween:Play();
        end);
    end)
end

function AdminGUI:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end


return AdminGUI
