--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/UI/AnimationGUI.lua ---

--[[
    AnimationGUI (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → UI
    Parent: UI
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local InventoryGUI;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local humanoid;

local animationGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('AnimationGUI');
local mainFrame = animationGUI.MainFrame;
local bodyFrame = mainFrame.BodyFrame;
local animationsFrame = bodyFrame.AnimationsFrame;

local connectedButtons = false;

local tweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');
local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(0.23, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out);
local showTween = tweenService:Create(mainFrame, tweenInfo, {Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)});
local hideTween = tweenService:Create(mainFrame, tweenInfo, {Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 1.5, 0)});

local Signal;

local AnimationGUI = {};

AnimationGUI.Animated = false;

local animationBtnFuncs = {
    SurrenderBtn = {
        Enabled = false,
        Animation = nil,
        Enable = function(self, btn)
            tweenService:Create(btn, tweenInfo, {ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159)}):Play();
            InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(false);
            humanoid:UnequipTools();
            humanoid.WalkSpeed = 10;
            self.Animation:Play();
            self.Enabled = true;
            AnimationGUI.Animated = true;
        end,
        Disable = function(self, btn)
            if humanoid.PlatformStand then return; end;
            if humanoid.SeatPart then return; end;
            tweenService:Create(btn, tweenInfo, {ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40)}):Play();
            humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16;
            self.Animation:Stop();
            self.Enabled = false;
            AnimationGUI.Animated = false;
            if not localPlayer:GetAttribute('HandcuffedBy') and not localPlayer:GetAttribute('Ragdoll') then
                InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(true);
            end
        end,
    },
    SitBtn = {
        Enabled = false,
        Animation = nil,
        Enable = function(self, btn)
            tweenService:Create(btn, tweenInfo, {ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159)}):Play();
            InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(false);
            humanoid:UnequipTools();
            humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0;
            humanoid.JumpPower = 0;
            self.Animation:Play();
            self.Enabled = true;
            AnimationGUI.Animated = true;
        end,
        Disable = function(self, btn)
            if humanoid.PlatformStand then return; end;
            if humanoid.SeatPart then return; end;
            tweenService:Create(btn, tweenInfo, {ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40)}):Play();
            InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(true);
            humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16;
            humanoid.JumpPower = 50;
            self.Animation:Stop();
            self.Enabled = false;
            AnimationGUI.Animated = false;
            if not localPlayer:GetAttribute('HandcuffedBy') and not localPlayer:GetAttribute('Ragdoll') then
                InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(true);
            end;
        end,
    },
    SaluteBtn = {
        Enabled = false,
        Animation = nil,
        Enable = function(self, btn)
            tweenService:Create(btn, tweenInfo, {ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159)}):Play();
            InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(false);
            humanoid:UnequipTools();
            humanoid.WalkSpeed = 10;
            self.Animation:Play();
            self.Enabled = true;
            AnimationGUI.Animated = true;
        end,
        Disable = function(self, btn)
            if humanoid.PlatformStand then return; end;
            if humanoid.SeatPart then return; end;
            tweenService:Create(btn, tweenInfo, {ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40)}):Play();
            humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16;
            self.Animation:Stop();
            self.Enabled = false;
            AnimationGUI.Animated = false;
            if not localPlayer:GetAttribute('HandcuffedBy') and not localPlayer:GetAttribute('Ragdoll') then
                InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(true);
            end
        end,
    },
    LayBtn = {
        Enabled = false,
        Animation = nil,
        Enable = function(self, btn)
            tweenService:Create(btn, tweenInfo, {ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159)}):Play();
            InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(false);
            humanoid:UnequipTools();
            humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0;
            humanoid.JumpPower = 0;
            self.Animation:Play();
            self.Enabled = true;
            AnimationGUI.Animated = true;
        end,
        Disable = function(self, btn)
            if humanoid.PlatformStand then return; end;
            if humanoid.SeatPart then return; end;
            tweenService:Create(btn, tweenInfo, {ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40)}):Play();
            InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(true);
            humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16;
            humanoid.JumpPower = 50;
            self.Animation:Stop();
            self.Enabled = false;
            AnimationGUI.Animated = false;
            if not localPlayer:GetAttribute('HandcuffedBy') and not localPlayer:GetAttribute('Ragdoll') then
                InventoryGUI.SetEnabled(true);
            end;
        end,
    }
};

function AnimationGUI:ToggleMainFrame()
    if mainFrame.Visible then
        hideTween:Play();
        hideTween.Completed:Wait();
        mainFrame.Visible = false;
    else
        mainFrame.Visible = true;
        showTween:Play();
    end;
end;

local function SetupButtons(char)
    if not char then return; end;

    humanoid = char:WaitForChild('Humanoid');

    for i, v in next, animationsFrame:GetChildren() do
        if v:IsA('ImageButton') then
            local animationBtnFunc = animationBtnFuncs[v.Name];
            animationBtnFunc.Animation = humanoid:WaitForChild("Animator"):LoadAnimation(v.Animation);
            animationBtnFunc:Disable(v);

            if not connectedButtons then
                v.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                    if not animationBtnFunc.Enabled then
                        if humanoid.Sit then return; end;

                        for i2, v2 in next, animationBtnFuncs do
                            if v2.Enabled then
                                v2:Disable(animationsFrame[i2]);
                            end;
                        end;

                        if localPlayer:GetAttribute('HandcuffedBy') then return; end;
                        if localPlayer:GetAttribute('Ragdoll') then return; end;
                        if humanoid.PlatformStand then return; end; -- If tased.
                        if humanoid.SeatPart then return; end;
                        AnimationGUI.GUIAnimationStartedSignal:Fire();
                        animationBtnFunc:Enable(v);
                    else
                        animationBtnFunc:Disable(v);
                    end;
                end);
            end;
        end;
    end;

    connectedButtons = true;
end;

function AnimationGUI:Start()
    self.GUIAnimationStartedSignal = Signal.new();

    SetupButtons(localPlayer.Character);
    localPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(SetupButtons);

    bodyFrame.BtnsFrame.ExitBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(self.ToggleMainFrame);

end;

function AnimationGUI:Init()
    Signal = self.Shared.Signal;
    InventoryGUI = self.Controllers.UI.InventoryGUI;
end;

return AnimationGUI;

--[[
    AtmGUI (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → UI

    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- AtmGUI
-- Khizzer
-- July 23, 2022
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService('MarketplaceService');
local Players = game:GetService('Players');
local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');


local TWEEN_INFO = TweenInfo.new(0.23);
local HOVER_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50);
local DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40);
local SELECTED_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159);
local DEFAULT_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 1.5);
local ACTIVE_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5);

local NetworkController;
local ListenerList;

local GuiListeners;


local AtmGUI = {}


local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer;
local atmGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('AtmGUI');
local mainFrame = atmGUI.MainFrame;
local bodyFrame = mainFrame.BodyFrame;
local btnsFrame = bodyFrame.BtnsFrame;
local exitBtn = btnsFrame.ExitBtn;
local moneyPurchaseListImage = bodyFrame.MoneyPurchaseListImage;
local moneyPurchaseListScrollingFrame = moneyPurchaseListImage.MoneyPurchaseScrollingFrame;
local TwentyFiveThousandBtn = moneyPurchaseListScrollingFrame['25kBtn'];
local OneHundredThousandBtn = moneyPurchaseListScrollingFrame['100kBtn'];
local TwoHundredFiftyThousandBtn = moneyPurchaseListScrollingFrame['250kBtn'];
local FiveHundredThousandBtn = moneyPurchaseListScrollingFrame['500kBtn'];
local moneyTransactionFrame = bodyFrame.MoneyTransactionFrame;
local withdrawBtn = moneyTransactionFrame.WithdrawBtn;
local depositBtn = moneyTransactionFrame.DepositBtn;
local transferBtn = moneyTransactionFrame.TransferBtn;
local moneyAmountBox = moneyTransactionFrame.MoneyAmountBox;
local usernameBox = moneyTransactionFrame.UsernameBox;


local openTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = ACTIVE_POSITION});
local closeTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = DEFAULT_POSITION});


function AtmGUI:Enable()
    if not GuiListeners then GuiListeners = ListenerList.new(); end;

    atmGUI.Enabled = true;
    openTween:Play();

    GuiListeners:Connect(withdrawBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        --Check if player has enough money
        local desiredAmount = tonumber(moneyAmountBox.Text);

        if desiredAmount > localPlayer.Bank.Value then
            _G.AeroError('You do not have enough money to withdraw that amount.');
            return;
        end;

        NetworkController.Send('WITHDRAW_MONEY', desiredAmount);
    end);

    GuiListeners:Connect(depositBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        --Check if player has enough money
        local desiredAmount = tonumber(moneyAmountBox.Text);

        if desiredAmount > localPlayer.Money.Value then
            _G.AeroError('You do not have enough money to deposit that amount.');
            return;
        end;

        NetworkController.Send('DEPOSIT_MONEY', desiredAmount);
    end);

    local transferDb = false
    GuiListeners:Connect(transferBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        if transferDb then return end
        transferDb = true
        --Check if player has enough money
        local amount = tonumber(moneyAmountBox.Text);

        if not amount then
            transferDb = false
            return _G.AeroError('Please enter a valid amount to transfer.');
        end;

        if amount > localPlayer.Bank.Value then
            _G.AeroError('You do not have enough money to transfer that amount.');
                transferDb = false
            return;
        end;

        local desiredUsername = usernameBox.Text;
        if desiredUsername:lower() == localPlayer.Name:lower() then
            _G.AeroError('You cannot transfer money to yourself.');
            transferDb = false
            return;
        end;

        if not GetPlayerFromName(desiredUsername) then
            local succ, res = pcall(function()
                return Players:GetUserIdFromNameAsync(desiredUsername);
            end);
            if not succ then
                transferDb = false
                if string.find(res, 'Unknown user') then
                    return _G.AeroError('The user you are trying to transfer money to does not exist.');
                end;
                _G.AeroError('An error occurred while trying to find the user. Try again.');
                return
            end;

            Notification.new('CAUTION', `You are about to transfer ${amount} to {desiredUsername} who is offline. Click Yes to confirm.`, nil, 'Red');
            self:Disable();
            YesNoPromptGUI:CreatePrompt('CAUTION: OFFLINE TRANSFER', `You are about to transfer ${amount} to {desiredUsername} who is offline. Do you want to proceed?`, function()
                NetworkController.Send('TRANSFER_MONEY', amount, desiredUsername);
                transferDb = false
            end, function()
                self:Enable();
                transferDb = false
            end)
            return;
        end;

        NetworkController.Send('TRANSFER_MONEY', amount, desiredUsername);
        transferDb = false
    end);

    GuiListeners:Connect(moneyAmountBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Text'), function()
        moneyAmountBox.Text = moneyAmountBox.Text:gsub('%D', '');
    end)

    GuiListeners:Connect(usernameBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Text'), function()
        usernameBox.Text = usernameBox.Text:gsub("%s+", "")
    end)

    GuiListeners:Connect(TwentyFiveThousandBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        MarketplaceService:PromptProductPurchase(localPlayer, 1289601805);
        --_G.AeroError('Disabled temporarily.')
    end);

    GuiListeners:Connect(OneHundredThousandBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        MarketplaceService:PromptProductPurchase(localPlayer, 1289601808);
        --_G.AeroError('Disabled temporarily.')
    end);

    GuiListeners:Connect(TwoHundredFiftyThousandBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        MarketplaceService:PromptProductPurchase(localPlayer, 1289602100);
        --_G.AeroError('Disabled temporarily.')
    end);

    GuiListeners:Connect(FiveHundredThousandBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        MarketplaceService:PromptProductPurchase(localPlayer, 1289602254);
        --_G.AeroError('Disabled temporarily.')
    end);
end;

function AtmGUI:Disable()
    closeTween:Play();
    closeTween.Completed:Wait();
    atmGUI.Enabled = false;

    GuiListeners:DisconnectAll();
end;

function AtmGUI:Start()
    exitBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(self.Disable);
end;

function AtmGUI:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    ListenerList = self.Shared.ListenerList;
    GetPlayerFromName = self.Shared.GetPlayerFromName;
    YesNoPromptGUI = self.Controllers.UI.YesNoPromptGUI;
    Notification = self.Controllers.UI.Notification;
end;

return AtmGUI

-- Billboard PurchaseGUI
-- Khizzer
-- July 15, 2022


local InsertService = game:GetService("InsertService")
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")

local BillboardPurchaseGUI = {}
local NetworkController;

local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');

local TWEEN_INFO = TweenInfo.new(0.23);
local HOVER_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50);
local DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40);
local SELECTED_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159);
local DEFAULT_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 1.5);
local ACTIVE_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5);

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local billboardPurchaseGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BillboardPurchaseGUI');
local mainFrame = billboardPurchaseGUI.MainFrame;
local bodyFrame = mainFrame.BodyFrame;
local previewFrame = bodyFrame.PreviewFrame;
local previewImage = previewFrame.PreviewImage;
local imageIdBoxImage = bodyFrame.ImageIdBoxImage;
local imageIdBox = imageIdBoxImage.ImageIdBox;
local btnsFrame = bodyFrame.BtnsFrame;
local purchaseBtn = btnsFrame.PurchaseBtn;
local exitBtn = btnsFrame.ExitBtn;

local opentween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = ACTIVE_POSITION})
local closeTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = DEFAULT_POSITION})

function BillboardPurchaseGUI:Enable()
    if billboardPurchaseGUI.Enabled then
        return;
    end;

    billboardPurchaseGUI.Enabled = true;
    opentween:Play();
end;

function BillboardPurchaseGUI:Disable()
    if not billboardPurchaseGUI.Enabled then
        return;
    end;

    closeTween:Play();
    closeTween.Completed:Wait();
    
    billboardPurchaseGUI.Enabled = false;
end;

local assetId;

function BillboardPurchaseGUI:Start()
    exitBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
        self:Disable();
    end);

    purchaseBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
        local imageId = imageIdBox.Text;
        
        if #imageId < 4 then
            _G.AeroError('Image ID must be at least 4 characters long.');
        end;
    end)

    imageIdBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Text'):Connect(function()
        local text =  imageIdBox.Text;

        imageIdBox.Text = text:gsub('%D', '');
    end)

    imageIdBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
        local text =  imageIdBox.Text;

        if #text > 4 then
            local succ, info = pcall(MarketplaceService.GetProductInfo, MarketplaceService, imageIdBox.Text, Enum.InfoType.Asset);
            if succ then
                local decalId = info.AssetId;

                assert(decalId, '[BillboardPurchaseGUI] Asset ID not found? ROBLOX might be having issues.');

                local imageId =  string.format("https://www.roblox.com/asset-thumbnail/image?assetId=%s&width=1920&height=1080&format=png", imageIdBox.Text);
                previewImage.Image = imageId;

                assetId = imageId;
            else
                previewImage.Image = '';
            end;
        else
            previewImage.Image = '';
        end;
    end)

    purchaseBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
        if not assetId then _G.AeroError('No image selected.'); return; end;
        NetworkController.Send('BillboardPurchase', assetId)
    end)
end;

function BillboardPurchaseGUI:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
end;


return BillboardPurchaseGUI

return {};

--[[ -- BoloGUI
-- Khizzer
-- February 18, 2022



local BoloGUI = {}
local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');

local TWEEN_INFO = TweenInfo.new(0.23);
local HOVER_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50);
local DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40);
local SELECTED_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159);
local DEFAULT_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 1.5);
local ACTIVE_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5);

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local boloGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BoloGUI');
local mainFrame = boloGUI.MainFrame;
local bodyFrame = mainFrame.BodyFrame;

local boloListImage = bodyFrame.BoloListImage;
local boloListScrollingFrame = boloListImage.BoloListScrollingFrame;
local newBtn = boloListScrollingFrame.NewBtn;

local detailsFrame = bodyFrame.DetailsFrame;
local nameLabel = detailsFrame.NameLabel;
local setByLabel = detailsFrame.SetByLabel;
local detailsLabel = detailsFrame.DetailsLabel;

local components = boloGUI.Components;
local BoloBtnPrefab = components.BoloBtn;

local RecordService;
local NetworkController;

local selectedBoloBtn;
local selectedCategoryBtn;

local NetworkFunctionController;

function BoloGUI:Enable()
    local bolos = NetworkFunctionController.InvokeServer('GetPlayerBolos'); --{ dict: {Username, Details, Reason}, }

    for _,v in next, bolos do
        local username = v.Username;
        local setBy = v.SetBy;
        local details = v.Details;

        local boloBtn = BoloBtnPrefab:Clone();
        boloBtn.Parent = boloListScrollingFrame;
        boloBtn.BoloLabel.Text = username;

        local hoverTween = TweenService:Create(boloBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = HOVER_BTN_COLOR});
        local hoverEndTween = TweenService:Create(boloBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR});
        local selectedTween = TweenService:Create(boloBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = SELECTED_BTN_COLOR});
        
        boloBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        if selectedBoloBtn == boloBtn then return; end;
        hoverTween:Play();
        end);
        
        boloBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        if selectedBoloBtn == boloBtn then return; end;
        hoverEndTween:Play();
        end);
        
        boloBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        if selectedBoloBtn then
        TweenService:Create(selectedBoloBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR}):Play();
        end
        
        selectedBoloBtn = boloBtn;
        selectedTween:Play();

        nameLabel.Text = 'Username: '..username;
        setByLabel.Text = 'Set By: '..setBy;
        detailsLabel.Text = 'Details: '..details;
        end);
    end
end;

function BoloGUI:Start()
    self:Enable();
end;

function BoloGUI:Init()
    NetworkFunctionController = self.Controllers.NetworkFunctionController
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    RecordService = self.Services.RecordService;
end;


return BoloGUI ]]

--[[
    BookGUI (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → UI
    Parent: UI
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- BookGUI
-- Khizzer
-- June 24, 2021



local BookGUI = {}; 

local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');

local DEFAULT_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 1.5);
local ACTIVE_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5);
local TWEEN_INFO = TweenInfo.new(0.23);
local HOVER_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50);
local DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40);
local SELECTED_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159);

local CRIMES_MODULE = require(game.ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild('CrimesModule'));

local Players = game:GetService('Players');
local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer;

local bookGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BookingGUI');
local mainFrame = bookGUI.MainFrame;
local bodyFrame = mainFrame.BodyFrame;
local detailsFrame = bodyFrame.DetailsFrame;
local suspectFrame = bodyFrame.SuspectFrame

local selectedCrimesLabel = bodyFrame.SelectedCrimesLabel;

local nameLabel = suspectFrame.NameLabel;
local boloLabel = suspectFrame.BoloLabel;
local arrestsLabel = suspectFrame.ArrestsLabel;
local citationsLabel = suspectFrame.CitationsLabel;

local descriptionBox = detailsFrame.DescriptionBox;

local crimesBtnImage = bodyFrame.CrimesBtnImage;
local crimesBtnBox = crimesBtnImage.CrimesBox;
local crimesList = crimesBtnImage.crimesImage.crimesScrollingFrame
local btnsFrame = bodyFrame.BtnsFrame;
local bookBtn = btnsFrame.BookBtn;
local exitBtn = btnsFrame.ExitBtn;

local NetworkController;
local NetworkFunctionController;

local openTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = ACTIVE_POSITION});
local closeTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = DEFAULT_POSITION});

local components = bookGUI.Components;
local crimeBtnPrefab = components.CrimeBtn;

local bookConnection;

local FastRemoveFirstValue;

local searchConnection;
local focusConnection;
local focusLostConnection;

local RecordService;
local Error;

local toggledBtn = {};

function BookGUI.IsEnabled()
    return bookGUI.Enabled;
end;

local function updateSelectedCrimes()
    local formattedTable = {};
    for _,v in next, toggledBtn do
        table.insert(formattedTable, v.Name);
    end;
    for i = 1, 3 do
        if not formattedTable[i] then
            formattedTable[i] = 'NONE';
        end;
    end;
    selectedCrimesLabel.Text = 'Selected Crimes: \n'..table.concat(formattedTable, '\n')
end

function BookGUI.Enable()
    openTween:Play();
    openTween.Completed:Wait();
    bookGUI.Enabled = true

    local suspectChararcter = localPlayer.Character.Torso:FindFirstChildOfClass('WeldConstraint').Part0.Parent

    if not suspectChararcter then return; end;

    if not focusConnection then 
        focusConnection = crimesBtnBox.Focused:Connect(function()
            if not crimesBtnImage.crimesImage.Visible then
                crimesBtnImage.crimesImage.Visible = true;
            else
                crimesBtnImage.crimesImage.Visible = false;
            end;

            if not searchConnection then
                searchConnection = crimesBtnBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Text'):Connect(function()
                    for _,v in next, crimesList:GetChildren() do
                        if v:IsA('ImageButton') then
                            v.Visible = false;
                            if string.find((v.Name):lower(), (crimesBtnBox.Text):lower()) then
                                v.Visible = true;
                            end;
                        end;
                    end;
                end);
            end;
        end);
    end;

    if not focusLostConnection then
        focusLostConnection = crimesBtnBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
            task.wait(0.5);
            crimesBtnImage.crimesImage.Visible = false;

            if searchConnection then
                searchConnection:Disconnect();
                searchConnection = nil;
            end
        end)
    end

    for crime, prisonTime in CRIMES_MODULE do
        local crimeBtn = crimeBtnPrefab:Clone();
        crimeBtn.Name = crime;
        crimeBtn.CrimeLabel.Text = crime;
        crimeBtn.Parent = crimesList;

        local defaultTween = TweenService:Create(crimeBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR});
        local hoverTween = TweenService:Create(crimeBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = HOVER_BTN_COLOR});
        local hoverEndTween = TweenService:Create(crimeBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR});
        local selectedTween = TweenService:Create(crimeBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = SELECTED_BTN_COLOR});

        crimeBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
            if table.find(toggledBtn, crimeBtn) then return; end;
            hoverTween:Play();
        end);

        crimeBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
            if table.find(toggledBtn, crimeBtn) then return; end;
            hoverEndTween:Play();
        end);

        crimeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            if table.find(toggledBtn, crimeBtn) then
                --disables if toggled
                defaultTween:Play()
                FastRemoveFirstValue(toggledBtn, crimeBtn);
            elseif #toggledBtn == 3 and (not table.find(toggledBtn, crimeBtn)) then
                --3 crimes activated, remove first one
                TweenService:Create(toggledBtn[1], TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR}):Play();
                table.remove(toggledBtn, 1);
                table.insert(toggledBtn, crimeBtn);
                selectedTween:Play()
            elseif #toggledBtn < 3 and (not table.find(toggledBtn, crimeBtn)) then
                --2 or less crimes activated
                selectedTween:Play();
                table.insert(toggledBtn, crimeBtn);
            end;

            updateSelectedCrimes();
        end);
    end;

    local data = NetworkFunctionController.InvokeServer('GetBookingData', suspectChararcter.Name);
    local bolo = data['Bolo'];
    local arrestCount = data['Arrests'];
    local citationCount = data['Citations'];

    nameLabel.Text = 'Username: '..suspectChararcter.Name;
    
    if bolo.SetBy then
        boloLabel.Text = 'Bolo: '.. bolo.SetBy ..'/'.. bolo.Details;
    else
        boloLabel.Text = 'Bolo: NONE';
    end;

    arrestsLabel.Text = 'Arrests: '..tostring(arrestCount);
    citationsLabel.Text = 'Citations: '..tostring(citationCount);
    

    bookConnection = bookBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        if #descriptionBox.Text < 10 then
            Error('Description of incident too short!');
            return;
        end;

        if #toggledBtn == 0 then
            Error('No crimes selected!');
            return;
        end;

        local crimesTable = {}
        for i,v in next, toggledBtn do
            table.insert(crimesTable, v.CrimeLabel.Text);
        end;

        if #crimesTable == 0 then
            Error('No crimes selected!');
            return;
        end;

        NetworkController.Send('bookPlayer', Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(suspectChararcter), crimesTable, descriptionBox.Text);
        BookGUI.Disable();
    end);
end

function BookGUI.Disable()
    closeTween:Play();
    closeTween.Completed:Wait();
    bookGUI.Enabled = false;

    toggledBtn = {};
    updateSelectedCrimes()

    nameLabel.Text = ''
    boloLabel.Text = ''

    if bookConnection then
        bookConnection:Disconnect();
        bookConnection = nil;
    end;

    if searchConnection then
        searchConnection:Disconnect();
        searchConnection = nil;
    end

    if focusConnection then
        focusConnection:Disconnect();
        focusConnection = nil;
    end

    if focusLostConnection then
        focusLostConnection:Disconnect();
        focusLostConnection = nil;
    end

    for i, v in next, crimesList:GetChildren() do
        if v:IsA('ImageButton') then
            v:Destroy();
        end;
    end;
end;

function BookGUI:Start()
    exitBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(self.Disable)
end;

function BookGUI:Init()
    NetworkFunctionController = self.Controllers.NetworkFunctionController
    RecordService = self.Services.RecordService;
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController
    FastRemoveFirstValue = self.Shared.TableUtil.FastRemoveFirstValue;
    Error = self.Controllers.UI.ErrorGUI.Error;
end;


return BookGUI;

-- Bottom Left ButtonsGUI
-- Khizzer
-- July 21, 2021



local BottomLeftButtonsGUI = {}

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local moneyValue = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Money');
local bankValue = localPlayer:WaitForChild('Bank');

local bottomLeftGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BottomLeftGUI');
local mainFrame = bottomLeftGUI.MainFrame;
local moneyFrame = mainFrame.MoneyFrame;
local moneyLabel = moneyFrame.MoneyLabel;
local bankLabel = mainFrame.BankLabel;

local AnimationGUI;
local LicenseLookupGUI;
local PlayerLookupGUI;
local TeamChangeGUI;
local GamepassGUI;
local JudgeGUI;
local GangGUI;
local PatrolLogGUI;
local NameHideGUI;
local MedicGearGUI;

local NumberSpinner;

local Button;

local GetLEOTeams;

local function listen(callback)
    localPlayer:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Team"):Connect(callback)
    localPlayer:GetAttributeChangedSignal("Division"):Connect(callback)
    task.defer(callback)
end

local function check(teams, divisions)
    if teams and teams[localPlayer.Team.Name] then
        return true
    end

    if divisions and divisions[localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h'] then
        return true
    end

    return false
end

function BottomLeftButtonsGUI:Start()
    local moneySpinner = NumberSpinner.fromGuiObject(moneyLabel);
    moneySpinner.Commas = true;
    moneySpinner.Decimals = 0;
    moneySpinner.Value = moneyValue.Value;
    moneySpinner.Prefix = "Wallet: $"

    moneyValue.Changed:Connect(function(newval)
		moneySpinner.Value = newval;
        moneySpinner.Prefix = "Wallet: $";
    end)

    local bankSpinner = NumberSpinner.fromGuiObject(bankLabel);
    bankSpinner.Commas = true;
    bankSpinner.Decimals = 0;
    bankSpinner.Value = bankValue.Value;
    bankSpinner.Prefix = "Bank: $"

    bankValue.Changed:Connect(function(newval)
		bankSpinner.Value = newval;
    end)

    local AnimationsBtn = Button.new(8592457358, function() --5737420864
        AnimationGUI:ToggleMainFrame();
    end);

    local TeamChangeBtn = Button.new(8592396293, function()
        TeamChangeGUI:Toggle();
    end)

    local GamepassShopBtn = Button.new(8592355343, function()
        GamepassGUI:Toggle();
    end)

    local LicenseLookupBtn = Button.new(7084713379, function()
        LicenseLookupGUI:Toggle();
    end);

    local PlrLookupBtn = Button.new(7084406942, function()
        PlayerLookupGUI:Toggle();
    end);

    local JudgeBtn = Button.new(9004407398, function()
        JudgeGUI:Enable();
    end)

--[[     local GangBtn = Button.new(9805973417, function()
        GangGUI:Toggle();
    end) ]]

    local PatrolLogBtn = Button.new(12056292276, function()
        PatrolLogGUI:Toggle();
    end)

    local NameHideBtn = Button.new(16371951860, function()
        NameHideGUI:Toggle();
    end)

    local MedicGearBtn = Button.new(16625794175, function()
        MedicGearGUI:Toggle();
    end)

    LicenseLookupBtn:Hide();
    PlrLookupBtn:Hide();

    listen(function()
        if localPlayer.Team.Name ~= "Prisoner" then
            AnimationsBtn:Show()
        else
            AnimationsBtn:Hide()
        end

        if check({
            ['British Columbia Sheriff Service'] = true,
            ['Vancouver Fire & Rescue Service'] = true,
            ['Correctional Service Canada'] = true,
            ['Vancouver Police Department'] = true,
            ['Parks Canada'] = true,
            ['Translink'] = true,
            ['British Columbia Automobile Association'] = true,
            ['British Columbia Ambulance Service'] = true,
        }) then
            PatrolLogBtn:Show()
        else
            PatrolLogBtn:Hide()
        end

        if check(GetLEOTeams(), {['GCPS'] = true}) then
            LicenseLookupBtn:Show()
            PlrLookupBtn:Show()
        else
            LicenseLookupBtn:Hide()
            PlrLookupBtn:Hide()
        end

        if check({
            ['British Columbia Ambulance Service'] = true,
            ['Vancouver Fire & Rescue Service'] = true,
            ['Vancouver Coastal Health'] = true
        },
    {
            ["12VFA"] = true
        }) then
            MedicGearBtn:Show()
        else
            MedicGearBtn:Hide()
        end

        if check({['Civilian'] = true, ['Prisoner'] = true}, {
            ['POU'] = true,
            ['GCPS'] = true,
        }) then
            NameHideBtn:Show()
        else
            NameHideBtn:Hide()
        end

        if localPlayer.Team.Name == "Provincial Court" then
            JudgeBtn:Show()
        else
            JudgeBtn:Hide()
            JudgeGUI:Disable()
        end
    end)

    --GangBtn:Hide()
end;

function BottomLeftButtonsGUI:Init()
    Button = self:WrapModule(require(script.Button));
    AnimationGUI = self.Controllers.UI.AnimationGUI;
    LicenseLookupGUI = self.Controllers.UI.LicenseLookupGUI;
    PlayerLookupGUI = self.Controllers.UI.PlayerLookupGUI;
    TeamChangeGUI = self.Controllers.UI.TeamChangeGUI;
    GetLEOTeams = self.Shared.Constants.WhitelistedTeams.GetLEOTeams;
    NumberSpinner = self.Modules.UI.NumberSpinner
    JudgeGUI = self.Controllers.UI.JudgeGUI;
    GangGUI = self.Controllers.UI.GangGUI;
    PatrolLogGUI = self.Controllers.UI.PatrolLogGUI;
    GamepassGUI = self.Controllers.UI.GamepassGUI;
    NameHideGUI = self.Controllers.UI.NameHideGUI;
    MedicGearGUI = self.Controllers.UI.MedicGearGUI;

end;

return BottomLeftButtonsGUI;

--[[
    Button (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → UI → BottomLeftGUI
    Parent: BottomLeftGUI
    ⚠️  NESTED SCRIPT: This script is inside another script
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Button
-- Khizzer
-- July 21, 2021



local Button = {}
Button.__index = Button;

local Players = game:GetService('Players');
local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer;
local ButtonsGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BottomLeftGUI');

local ButtonsFrame = ButtonsGUI.MainFrame.GuiButtons;

local position = UDim2.new(0, 213, 1, 30);

function Create(obj)
	obj = Instance.new(obj)
	return function (props)
		for prop, val in next, props do
			obj[prop] = val
		end
		return obj
	end
end

function Button.new(imageID, callback)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Button);

    self.button = Create 'ImageButton' {
        Parent = ButtonsFrame;
        Size = UDim2.new(0, 30, 0, 30);
        Image = 'rbxassetid://'..tostring(imageID);
        BackgroundTransparency = 1;
    }

    self.button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        if callback then
            callback();
        else
            error('Failed to provide callback function for button with ID: '..tostring(imageID));
         end;
    end);

    return self;
end;

function Button:Hide()
    self.button.Visible = false;
end;

function Button:Show()
    self.button.Visible = true;
end;


return Button;

--[[
    BottomRightGUI (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → UI
    Parent: UI
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Bottom RightGUI
-- Khizzer
-- March 14, 2024


local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local bottomRightGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BottomRightGUI');
local mainFrame = bottomRightGUI.MainFrame;
local characterFrame = mainFrame.CharacterFrame;

local humanoid: Humanoid?;

local BottomRightGUI = {}

function BottomRightGUI:SetCharacterBar(name, val, maxVal)
    local frame = characterFrame:FindFirstChild(`{name}Frame`);

    if name ~= 'Health' then
        frame.Visible = (val < maxVal);
    end

    local bar = frame.BarImage;
    bar.Size = UDim2.fromScale(val / maxVal, 1);
end;

function BottomRightGUI:CharacterAdded(char)
    humanoid = char:WaitForChild('Humanoid');
end

function BottomRightGUI:Start()
    task.defer(function()
        while true do
            task.wait(0.25);
            local remainingTime, maxCombatTime = self.Controllers.Character.CombatController:GetResetTime();
            self:SetCharacterBar('Combat', maxCombatTime - remainingTime, maxCombatTime);

            if not humanoid then continue end
            local health = humanoid.Health;
            local maxHealth = humanoid.MaxHealth;
            self:SetCharacterBar('Health', health, maxHealth);
        end
    end)
end

function BottomRightGUI:Init()
    coroutine.wrap(function()
		while true do
			local suc = pcall(function()
				-- game:GetService('StarterGui'):SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.Health, false);
                game:GetService('StarterGui'):SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.EmotesMenu, false);
			end);
			if suc then break; end;
			task.wait();
		end;
	end)();
end


return BottomRightGUI

]]
-- Business ToolGUI
-- Khizzer
-- September 5, 2022



local BusinessToolGUI = {}

local NetworkController;
local ListenerList;
local GuiListeners;
local RunService = game:GetService('RunService')

local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');

local TWEEN_INFO = TweenInfo.new(0.23);
local HOVER_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50);
local DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40);
local SELECTED_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159);
local DEFAULT_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 1.5);
local ACTIVE_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5);

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local businessToolGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BusinessToolGUI');
local mainFrame = businessToolGUI.MainFrame;
local bodyFrame = mainFrame.BodyFrame;
local toolFrame = bodyFrame.ToolsFrame;
local toolListScrollingFrame = toolFrame.ToolListScrollingFrame;
local btnsFrame = bodyFrame.BtnsFrame;
local exitBtn = btnsFrame.ExitBtn;

local components = businessToolGUI.Components;
local toolBtnPrefab = components.ToolBtn;

local openTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = ACTIVE_POSITION});
local closeTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = DEFAULT_POSITION});


function BusinessToolGUI:Enable(interactionPart: BasePart, toolList: {string})
    if not GuiListeners then
        GuiListeners = ListenerList.new();
    end;

    businessToolGUI.Enabled = true;
    openTween:Play();

    for _,v in next, toolListScrollingFrame:GetChildren() do
        if v:IsA('ImageButton') then
            v:Destroy();
        end;
    end;

    GuiListeners:Connect(RunService.Heartbeat, function()
        if localPlayer:DistanceFromCharacter(interactionPart.Position) > 10 then
            self:Disable();
        end;
    end);

    for _,v in toolList do
        local toolBtn = toolBtnPrefab:Clone();
        toolBtn.Parent = toolListScrollingFrame;
        toolBtn.ToolLabel.Text = v;

        GuiListeners:Connect(toolBtn.MouseEnter, function()
            TweenService:Create(toolBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {BackgroundColor3 = HOVER_BTN_COLOR}):Play();
        end);

        GuiListeners:Connect(toolBtn.MouseLeave, function()
            TweenService:Create(toolBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {BackgroundColor3 = DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR}):Play();
        end);

        GuiListeners:Connect(toolBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
            NetworkController.Send('BusinessTool', interactionPart, v);
            -- self:Disable();
        end);

        GuiListeners:Connect(exitBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
            self:Disable();
        end)
    end;
end;

function BusinessToolGUI:Disable()
    if GuiListeners then
        GuiListeners:DisconnectAll();
        GuiListeners = nil;
    end;

    for _,v in next, toolListScrollingFrame:GetChildren() do
        if v:IsA('ImageButton') then
            v:Destroy();
        end;
    end;

    closeTween:Play();
    closeTween.Completed:Wait();
    businessToolGUI.Enabled = false;
end;

function BusinessToolGUI:Toggle(...)
    if businessToolGUI.Enabled then
        self:Disable()
    else
        self:Enable(...)
    end
end

function BusinessToolGUI:Init()
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    ListenerList = self.Shared.ListenerList;
end;


return BusinessToolGUI

--[[
    BusSignGUI (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → UI
    Parent: UI
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
-- Bus SignGUI
-- Khizzer
-- September 6, 2022



local BusSignGUI = {}

local ListenerList;
local GuiListeners;
local NetworkController;
local Draggable;
local StopIds;

local selectedStopBtn;

local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');

local DEFAULT_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 1.5);
local ACTIVE_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5);
local TWEEN_INFO = TweenInfo.new(0.23);
local HOVER_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50);
local DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40);
local SELECTED_BTN_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(79, 121, 159);

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local busSignGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('BusSignGUI');
local mainFrame = busSignGUI.MainFrame;
local topBarFrame = mainFrame.TopBarFrame;
local bodyFrame = mainFrame.BodyFrame;
local signFrame = bodyFrame.SignFrame;
local signBox = signFrame.SignBox; --The route destination text
local numberFrame = bodyFrame.NumberFrame;
local numberBox = numberFrame.NumberBox; --The route number
local btnsFrame = bodyFrame.BtnsFrame;
local setBtn = btnsFrame.SetBtn;

local stopAnnouncementsBtnImage = bodyFrame.StopAnnouncementsBtnImage;
local stopAnnoucementsDropdownBtn = stopAnnouncementsBtnImage.DropdownBtn;
local stopAnnouncementsDropdown = stopAnnouncementsBtnImage.StopAnnouncementsDropdown;
local stopAnnoucementsScrollingFrame = stopAnnouncementsDropdown.StopAnnouncementsScrollingFrame;

local stopAnnoucementBtnPrefab = busSignGUI.Components.StopAnnoucementBtn;

local openTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = ACTIVE_POSITION});
local closeTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TWEEN_INFO, {Position = DEFAULT_POSITION});

local selectedStop;

local MAX_ROUTE_NUMBER_LENGTH = 2;

local TRANSLINK_TEAM = game:GetService('Teams').Translink;

function BusSignGUI:Enable()
    if localPlayer.Team ~= TRANSLINK_TEAM then
        return;
    end;

    if not GuiListeners then
        GuiListeners = ListenerList.new();
    end;

    busSignGUI.Enabled = true;
    openTween:Play();

    --Restrict numberBox to only numbers
    GuiListeners:Connect(numberBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Text'), function()
        numberBox.Text = numberBox.Text:sub(1, MAX_ROUTE_NUMBER_LENGTH):gsub('%D', '');
    end);

    GuiListeners:Connect(setBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        NetworkController.Send('SetBusSign', {
            routeNumber = numberBox.Text;
            routeDestination = signBox.Text;
        });
    end);

    GuiListeners:Connect(stopAnnoucementsDropdownBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
        stopAnnouncementsDropdown.Visible = not stopAnnouncementsDropdown.Visible;
    end);

    for _, text in StopIds.StopOrder do
        local stopAnnoucementBtn = stopAnnoucementBtnPrefab:Clone();
        stopAnnoucementBtn.StopLabel.Text = text;
        stopAnnoucementBtn.Parent = stopAnnoucementsScrollingFrame;
        GuiListeners:Connect(stopAnnoucementBtn.MouseButton1Down, function()
            NetworkController.Send('BUS_STOP_ANNOUNCEMENT', text);
        end);

        local hoverTween = TweenService:Create(stopAnnoucementBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = HOVER_BTN_COLOR});
        local hoverEndTween = TweenService:Create(stopAnnoucementBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR});
        local selectedTween = TweenService:Create(stopAnnoucementBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = SELECTED_BTN_COLOR});
        
        GuiListeners:Connect(stopAnnoucementBtn.MouseEnter, function()
            if selectedStopBtn == stopAnnoucementBtn then return; end;
            hoverTween:Play();
        end);
        
        GuiListeners:Connect(stopAnnoucementBtn.MouseLeave, function()
            if selectedStopBtn == stopAnnoucementBtn then return; end;
            hoverEndTween:Play();
        end);
        
        GuiListeners:Connect(stopAnnoucementBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
            if selectedStopBtn then
                TweenService:Create(selectedStopBtn, TWEEN_INFO, {ImageColor3 = DEFAULT_BTN_COLOR}):Play();
            end
        
            selectedStopBtn = stopAnnoucementBtn;
            selectedTween:Play();
        end);
    end;
end;

function BusSignGUI:Disable()
    if GuiListeners then
        GuiListeners:DisconnectAll();
        GuiListeners = nil;
    end;

    for _,v in next, stopAnnoucementsScrollingFrame:GetChildren() do
        if v:IsA('ImageButton') then
            v:Destroy();
        end;
    end;

    selectedStopBtn = nil;

    closeTween:Play();
    closeTween.Completed:Once(function()
        busSignGUI.Enabled = false;
    end);
end;

function BusSignGUI:Start()
    Draggable.new(busSignGUI, topBarFrame, mainFrame);

    NetworkController.Connect('BusGuiVisibility', function(status)
        if status == true then
            self:Enable();
        else
            self:Disable();
        end;
    end)


end;

function BusSignGUI:Init()
    Draggable = self.Modules.UI.Draggable;
    ListenerList = self.Shared.ListenerList;
    NetworkController = self.Controllers.NetworkController;
    StopIds = self.Shared.Constants.TranslinkStopIds;
end;


return BusSignGUI

--- SCRIPT PATH: StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/vClient/Controllers/UI/CallsignGUI.lua ---

--[[
    CallsignGUI (ModuleScript)
    Path: StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → vClient → Controllers → UI
    Parent: UI
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:56
]]
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local CallsignGUI = {};

local CallsignController;
local RadioGUI;
local DispatchGUI;
local CheckEmergencyServices;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local teamName;

local callsignGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('CallsignGUI');
local mainFrame = callsignGUI.MainFrame;
local bodyFrame = mainFrame.BodyFrame;
local callsignBox = bodyFrame.CallsignBoxImage.CallsignBox;
local callsignLabel = bodyFrame.CallsignLabel;
local setBtn = bodyFrame.BtnsFrame.SetBtn;

local prefixes;

local listeners;

local Comm = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Comm)
local ClientComm = Comm.ClientComm.new(ReplicatedStorage, false, 'cov')
local CallsignsProperty = ClientComm:GetProperty('saved_callsigns', {})

local MAX_SUFFIX_LENGTH = 3;
local ALREADY_TAKEN = 'Callsign already taken';
local DEFAULTS = {
    [71812450] = '047';
    [47890485] = '098';
    [25198607] = '434';
};

local mathMin = math.min;

local function SetCallsignLabelText()
    local text = callsignBox.Text;
    local suffix;
    suffix = text .. ('-'):rep(mathMin(MAX_SUFFIX_LENGTH - #text, MAX_SUFFIX_LENGTH));
    if not prefixes[teamName] and not prefixes[localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h'] then return CallsignGUI:Disable(true) end
    if localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') then
        callsignLabel.Text = prefixes[localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division')] .. suffix;
    else
        callsignLabel.Text = prefixes[teamName] .. suffix;
    end;
end;

function CallsignGUI:Enable(_teamName)
    teamName = _teamName;
    if CallsignController.HasRegisteredCallsign(teamName) then
        RadioGUI:Enable();
        if CheckEmergencyServices(localPlayer) or localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') == 'GCPS' then
            DispatchGUI:Enable()
        end
        return;
    end;

    local prefix = prefixes[localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h'] or prefixes[teamName]
    if CallsignsProperty:Get() and CallsignsProperty:Get()[prefix] then
        callsignBox.Text = CallsignsProperty:Get()[prefix]
    elseif DEFAULTS[localPlayer.UserId] then
        callsignBox.Text = DEFAULTS[localPlayer.UserId];
    else
        callsignBox.Text = '';
    end;

    if RadioGUI.IsEnabled() then
        RadioGUI:Disable();
        DispatchGUI:Disable();
    end;
    listeners:Connect(callsignBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Text'), function()
        local text = callsignBox.Text;
        if text == ALREADY_TAKEN then return; end;
        callsignBox.Text = text:sub(1, MAX_SUFFIX_LENGTH):gsub('%D', '');
        SetCallsignLabelText();
    end);
    listeners:Connect(setBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
        local text = callsignBox.Text;
        if #text ~= MAX_SUFFIX_LENGTH then return; end;
        local alreadyTaken = CallsignController.SetCallsign(text);
        if alreadyTaken then
            callsignBox.Text = ALREADY_TAKEN;
            return;
        end;
        RadioGUI:Enable();
        if CheckEmergencyServices(localPlayer) or localPlayer:GetAttribute('Division') == 'GCPS' then
            DispatchGUI:Enable()
        end
    end);
    SetCallsignLabelText();
    callsignGUI.Enabled = true;
    mainFrame.Visible = true;
    mainFrame:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0), Enum.EasingDirection.Out, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, 0.23, true);
end;

function CallsignGUI:Disable(disableRadio)
    listeners:DisconnectAll();
    if disableRadio then
        RadioGUI:Disable();
        DispatchGUI:Disable();
    end;
    mainFrame:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 1.5, 0), Enum.EasingDirection.Out, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, 0.23, true, function()
        mainFrame.Visible = false;
        callsignGUI.Enabled = false;
    end);
end;

function CallsignGUI:Start()

end;

function CallsignGUI:Init()
    CallsignController = self.Controllers.CallsignController;
    prefixes = self.Shared.CallsignPrefixes;
    RadioGUI = self.Controllers.UI.RadioGUI;
    DispatchGUI = self.Controllers.UI.DispatchGUI;
    listeners = self.Shared.ListenerList.new();
    local WhitelistedTeams = self.Shared.Constants.WhitelistedTeams;
	CheckEmergencyServices = WhitelistedTeams.CheckEmergencyServices;
end;

return CallsignGUI;
